name: Justice Democrats
subject: Every Justice Democrat is cosponsoring this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Israel’s war with Iran is worsening by the day, and the Trump
administration is threatening to get the United States more and more
involved — even though presidents do not have the power to declare war.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250618-signup-supportwarpowersres?source=em20250618-36773&akid=36773%2E1203867%2EtCFwNo ]We can’t afford another deadly, endless war in the Middle East, which
is why every Justice Democrat in Congress is cosponsoring a war powers
resolution to stop it. Will you add your name to support this resolution
as a citizen cosponsor?

Last week, the Israeli military attacked Iran — including strikes on
residential buildings — undermining nuclear agreement negotiations between
the United States and Iran, and moving closer to a full-blown regional war
in the Middle East.

At first, Secretary of State Marco Rubio claimed the U.S. was not involved
in the strikes, but Donald Trump soon claimed he knew all about it ahead
of time, and has since threatened Iran with U.S. intervention on behalf of
Israel.

Since then, Iran has retaliated, and the two countries have exchanged
strikes on the cities of Tel Aviv and Tehran over the last six days,
killing nearly 250 people in total so far. We cannot let Israel drag us
into this, Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250618-signup-supportwarpowersres?source=em20250618-36773&akid=36773%2E1203867%2EtCFwNo ]A screenshot of a post on X from Rashida Tlaib (@RashidaTlaib): 'There
are too many war mongers in Congress. Many profit financially sending our
children to wars. Many are drooling at the opportunity to help defense
contractors. Let's be clear: Netanyahu is playing us. This is about
staying in power for him. He is a war criminal.'

As Rep. Rashida Tlaib pointed out, Trump, many Republicans, and even some
war-hungry Democrats in the pockets of corporate defense contractors are
chomping at the bit to send us into another war. Despite a lack of
evidence, they’re trying to push the same ‘weapons of mass destruction’
narrative they used to justify the Iraq War, which was an unnecessary
disaster based on lies that killed millions.

War hawks have been making these claims about Iran’s nuclear capabilities
for decades, and we know why: weapons manufacturers and the rest of the
military-industrial complex rely on bipartisan warmongering so our
taxpayer dollars can line their pockets with profits. Just this year,
Lockheed Martin has given:

🚀 $1 million to Trump’s inaugural committee
🚀 $135,000 to the DSCC, DCCC, & DNC
🚀 $125,000 to NRSC, NRCC, & RNC

Every member of Congress — especially every Democrat — should oppose U.S.
involvement, funding, weapons, or troops fighting another endless war in
the Middle East.

This is another U.S. and Israel-backed attempt at regime change in the
Middle East that risks all-out regional war and chaos and has no support
from the American people.

Rep. Ro Khanna and Republican Rep. Thomas Massie have introduced a measure
under the War Powers Resolution of 1973 to prohibit U.S. involvement &
taxpayer funding for Netanyahu’s reckless and desperate war with Iran —
and the rest of our bloc are original cosponsors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250618-signup-supportwarpowersres?source=em20250618-36773&akid=36773%2E1203867%2EtCFwNo ]This is a rare opportunity for bipartisanship that doesn't sell out the
American people. Add your name to say ‘No War with Iran’ and demand that
Congress pass this war powers resolution to stop it →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250618-signup-supportwarpowersres?source=em20250618-36773&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&akid=36773%2E1203867%2EtCFwNo ]Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250618-36773-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36773_1203867_tCFwNo&akid=36773%2E1203867%2EtCFwNo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36773%2E1203867%2EtCFwNo

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: MAGA attacks escalate! (via VPP)
subject: Will you stand with Gavin Newsom?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We’re just waiting on you...
| **⚠️ _TRUMP’S ATTACKS AGAINST GAVIN NEWSOM ARE ESCALATING_ ⚠️** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91211?t=6&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO) **But we’re STILL waiting for you to sign onto our letter to stand with Governor Gavin Newsom — _what gives!?_**

[**We’re hitting send tomorrow at 9AM, friend, and we’re waiting on just 12 signatures from your state. Don’t leave us hanging:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91211?t=7&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO) | [**SIGN MY NAME: STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91211?t=8&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Governor Newsom,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy and the will of the people against Donald Trump’s _extremist political theater_ in California.**

You are bravely risking everything — even arrest — to stand up for the American people, and we’re extremely grateful.

**As Trump resorts to POLITICAL THEATER to threaten and intimidate Americans,_your resilience is needed now more than ever._**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting Trump do whatever he pleases — so I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91211?t=9&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91211?t=10&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91211?t=11&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO)
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20269%2E878179%2EPWC2iO)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: re: My journey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Hopefully, you will learn something new about me, feel inspired, and follow through with a $25 donation to my campaign.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109844838/552440626/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-18_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU5YzJmNDktYTE0Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TBZrWR29QMEVz73BkyOurQq43VLxS5gDMEyFqzB3yoI=)

| Peter, now that the general election is here, I wanted to take a moment to tell you how the daughter of a nurse and law enforcement officer just became the Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia.

Please give me a few minutes of your time to read this long but deeply personal message from beginning to end.

Hopefully, you will learn something new about me, feel inspired, and follow through with a $25 donation to my campaign.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109844840/552440637/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-18_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU5YzJmNDktYTE0Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TBZrWR29QMEVz73BkyOurQq43VLxS5gDMEyFqzB3yoI=)
---
I'm running to serve our Commonwealth because Virginia is my home, and it deserves a leader who cares more about bettering people's lives than scoring political points.

Growing up in Henrico County, I recognized early on the importance of serving my community and my country. Around our dinner table, I heard my mom's stories from her shifts at the hospital and my dad's from his time in the army or working cases he loved. I went to Henrico County Public Schools, graduated from the University of Virginia, and quickly decided I wanted to follow in my parents' footsteps and dedicate my life to protecting others.

I started as a federal law enforcement officer tracking narcotics traffickers and money laundering operations. Next, I joined the CIA as a case officer. I took my oath and spent day-in and day-out undercover working to keep our country safe from terrorist threats. Then, following the 2016 election, I felt a profound responsibility to help push back against the Trump Administration's efforts to rip healthcare away from millions of people.

I'd never expected to be a candidate for elected office, but in 2018, I went ahead and ran for Congress. It was a district that hadn't elected a Democrat since 1968, but guess what happened?

_I won!_

And every day as an elected representative, walking the hallowed halls of the United States Capitol, I worked with my staff to prioritize the issues that actually kept families back home up at night. We focused on lowering prescription drug prices, supporting veterans like my dad, defending reproductive rights, rebuilding infrastructure, bringing countless jobs to our Commonwealth, and much, much more.

_Through it all, I stayed focused on putting Virginians first._

And it's that same mission which motivates my campaign for Governor. The challenges facing our Commonwealth are too urgent to ignore, from skyrocketing costs to unprecedented attacks on our freedoms. And they're too serious to entrust to my opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, who sings the praises of Donald Trump and wants to drag his destructive agenda across the Potomac and force each of us to accept the consequences.

Let me be crystal clear: **I've spent my career standing up for Virginians and working to defend our Constitution — and I won't stand by while President Trump and his allies work to dismantle it.**

As we've seen since January, Democratic Governors are the first line of defense against Trump's abuses of power. When I'm elected, I will stand strong against any attempt to restrict reproductive freedoms, limit our right to vote, or deny our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors the joy that comes with marrying the person they love.

I wouldn't be able to carry out this campaign without my husband Adam and our three girls behind me.

I strive every day to approach this work with humility, and the truth is that we're the odds-on favorite to flip this seat. In a few month's time, we can send a message to Trump's White House at the ballot box. But we're already seeing Republicans spend over a million dollars on ads against us that aim to scare and mislead people into backing my opponent. That's simply not the campaign I intend to run.

**It's going to take every person reading this to commit some time, energy — _and yes, some money_ — to wage an honorable campaign, to counter all the attacks, and to succeed in flipping Virginia blue on November 4th.**

Now, I know that was a lot, but you deserved to hear about my journey before receiving a candid request for your donation.

[_**Peter, what do you say? Will you make a contribution of any amount (our average is $30 this month) to become a founding member of my campaign for Governor of Virginia? The contributions we receive to emails and texts fund investments in ads, organizers, and the like, and they're critical to putting our best foot forward in the general election.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109844842/552440654/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-18_3&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU5YzJmNDktYTE0Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TBZrWR29QMEVz73BkyOurQq43VLxS5gDMEyFqzB3yoI=)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Two polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
| Team, in the span of one day, two outlets released polls of the Virginia Governor's race.

The first had me running way ahead of my opponent._The second had us neck-and-neck._

Now, what these polls tell us is that there are a lot of undecided voters out there, and the campaign that's able to raise the money necessary to reach these folks will win. We just launched our first TV and digital ads of the general election, and your support will help us keep those ads running.

_So, I'm asking you directly:_

[ **Will you split a contribution of any amount between my campaign and Tony Evers? The money we raise can pay for the ads and organizers that will lead us to victory on November 4th.**

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: I’m told my reputation precedes me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Folks - it's John Kennedy.[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=77835d43ba214da1a1cbee4ad946632d&_e=ShMjkHKX0zdRH0sRzWpYiidizoCKkg0kAQnubHwugnSubpcRpLwhznLcX5QHJtchsX6BGJ5xq2_IONJMyapy-ewmjNd2tV_yhNe-cSPf4WkrAk2oOVndgWpS5wRRFRFHW7D6jbDETKqVYzU8IOWMZNjNm9MfoX56wSCgSHdVSp4S4hXWarHUu2XV9rk7qnxaT74AkCs1jXFJEyVLokfjh9ALaU6OOYEXU2pk4ss8-EjiV1vfqvfxF-A3gsNJtFwrpBQS2l-GFxCCRKgfaPEkFysbnK_8uUqi2olKcUAeTbUE0FTaKbbuM45eCwMaOpAb20pG1zen9Bfj6V5uyZkkxcgtOqRAXyx4fA4NbgtjzXNX-nMqnTrrPs3qGVZbB5L3xLpQjYxcQhjKavne9kVvpd9-SOasJoFsRZsEcz3TQ3nTElh7mvfPqoF_gKLkqMdOLZUbO3k_Xw_RqbR0-CyBwldOsKoSb2hlMXTChFBvgg23JJMmrrFlZdddSzxAbuGZVeIRfdXGVmrD_ZLALNrPYUbQI-BEAs_aLSqWZrV2Cefb2Rg8pztHrRMIlAa8hE6erpsYGeAEOmnNc_iXPO9_z-CdhYFUkIz7I6C8w1DdJGVpiSMvcVp5CcHlMdhsN741WLUdFhqeOHIDieP6F1oYfXY1-PGkFqw4k7qKbaxozqI%3D)I'm told my reputation precedes me.
I hope that's a good thing.
I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.
So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.
My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.
That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!
_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal.__
_It 'll be a real disaster if they miss it.

I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart. So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now. My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before. That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives! And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal. It 'll be a real disaster if they miss it. With all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. control the House by the slimmest margins in 100 years. They are all about putting YOU, the American people, before the D.C. insiders, special interests, and career politicians. Peter, we're urgently updating the -- and your voice is missing. This is your chance to set the record straight and go on file as a proud America First patriot. Stand with President Trump. Stand with Vice President JD Vance. Stand for America. name: Jay Jones
subject: Proud to be your Democratic nominee for Attorney General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?amount=30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?amount=30]
Derek,
I’m Jay Jones, and I’m officially the Democratic Nominee for Attorney General!
I'm so grateful to have the support of this strong grassroots movement because I know that together, we can take on MAGA Attorney General Jason Miyares in the general election. If you're fired up too, will you please become a Founding Donor of my General Election Launch Fund by splitting a donation between me and Tim Kaine ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?amount=30]
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?amount=30]
Right now, I'm thinking of my family. My grandfather and father laid the foundation for a more just Commonwealth as civil rights lawyers and fought for everyone to have a fair shot at the American Dream. I'm thinking of my sons and how I hope I can continue their fight so they and every family can have a safer and just future.
I hope to continue their legacy, and hope you'll stand with me as our next Attorney General.
We overcame our first challenge of the race, but we need to start gearing up NOW to defeat Jason Miyares and his MAGA billionaire buddies who are ready to spend millions to keep this seat.
Derek: If you're ready for change, please become a Founding Donor of my General Election Launch Fund by splitting a donation between me and Tim Kaine . We can't slow down now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?amount=30]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?express_lane=true&amount=30]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-jones?amount=30]
I can't thank you enough, Derek. We're only getting started.
Thank you again,
Jay Jones
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
As a senior how do you feel about their findings? _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.** **And that’s why I need your immediate response:[Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=94ca2a087db1402a9dcac594a4879d68&_e=gNEMFenPLXAWDddqWzkpWV2_ZIdDM95kseSv-MDHCTlLZHZ7bDw8TN0IFeS1Y0ve0mqPoiAHCEFdaQtwYjaPsimj8Mge10CF1eo2dsGiOFc7QulkXb2zDWfZmTg7HFt2h5HPsAqLShITzjggzc6Ah2LQGUdsFPobbaonVF6PLKzEaUevfd7S6Uy6ohTgiqObizpWa2gyrVdKxDLVidD6YWpGiBTJblVYoAEzLLpB8CKMxv5yOeXQZ5pJDidBJWicXXLNWHoTMi6SILez1eqRr1IiJpt7MFmPQeJfU0sN_AQBAtAqG8-JPfweMmQ1DTLgII0NfBUIT-jnvPzZ56LmvucdILkAVDNWGH90Y8Lj9rdq9QLYd14ceGFLurdgtPtEOSUF2HTMYf7_P6aGo8IMuPJjxkiD-G8gFJZlfjnpQ-KX9fE39JkbtmSvO7lfH1DPrRjigWOhy3aN287HvlEYzCcOY5ht22_a6uXIjUgFSaxm6-BOVV8Dusrz2RiLNZn7lsXg36m7Y_L5AlkljcwyRADLLddRXzRwQDQVZxvLhnccTt_QK9cyy37e_KeF_G0s5XnuH_q6DL_SMaqXFpzimg9rCwnR8_EkTronr-zNydI%3D)**

**My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. **** ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** **[And today I’m asking you to stand with us to correct the narrative being pushed by radical organizations.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=94ca2a087db1402a9dcac594a4879d68&_e=gNEMFenPLXAWDddqWzkpWV2_ZIdDM95kseSv-MDHCTlLZHZ7bDw8TN0IFeS1Y0ve0mqPoiAHCEFdaQtwYjaPsimj8Mge10CF1eo2dsGiOFc7QulkXb2zDWfZmTg7HFt2h5HPsAqLShITzjggzc6Ah2LQGUdsFPobbaonVF6PLKzEaUevfd7S6Uy6ohTgiqObizpWa2gyrVdKxDLVidD6YdT5URF0OBODRdlT3ZjWTiIcnAFZ6WUJW-A9FBmH-QKPXqv19VoxXTZ0r8n0nxkiFKXPfwnqPIMALrAHrTvBPvLLHpfmDbdCgHkaNiF4rQlyr8od8g-cIO8_5wC7A9HuUSeY9dPQvDEvtHXweF4SxdGmBbfo24_xJfqNF9l7h9QowPcJfJTODLZlwbjKOkVEc7RuGSLddTY_vFOeNyozeGJYnxXeg-fuw_kU1_ReXRH57HjREGkWpdOLsAGpy6c-A-1D-05LjVAy0GnKBk6ujk6DehLuLRvAsWeQwC6fvLeB7_Cpbwch4r1yGVpg4GSIx2csvPivTCkEZ3L-MwkIozH2mZoObMkbgjOwnpsMXJ8SvL72xXeSOiq0xw-6qPLYU5m7eOQAdpET6Gi8J57Pc7U%3D)** At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting **_AGAINST_** the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting **_FOR_** it...The terrifying reality is that **_the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year_** fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just _pushing_ the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively _forcing_ it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- **_transgender ideology is everywhere._** They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. ****AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.**** While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue.**[I'm counting on you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=94ca2a087db1402a9dcac594a4879d68&_e=gNEMFenPLXAWDddqWzkpWV2_ZIdDM95kseSv-MDHCTlLZHZ7bDw8TN0IFeS1Y0ve0mqPoiAHCEFdaQtwYjaPsimj8Mge10CF1eo2dsGiOFc7QulkXb2zDWfZmTg7HFt2h5HPsAqLShITzjggzc6Ah2LQGUdsFPobbaonVF6PLKzEaUevfd7S6Uy6ohTgiqObizpWa2gyrVdKxDLVidD6YTlYhr260bgSuneFavERwIo0ATr6bo-55qd0APGCFujIzHIwOxfFdZzswBARqasewB9uMsu3NtvDOHkwiFQqBdzsjGA9_LncRteX54TnINTu-LKin-5LMD8UA-UtW5mQFQGcJpAKf_juL0pKy12bIlAVTCA64roTPSu3LlcBEuo7ZGblJs6XLD16w59v8EwQSBqvTfw-XZLsS-sJLEqEq0xFj1b8nvOXSj4TB3OHSpSREKGUTgntBxjeYCmplNaCbGh8EOJiwiXijFBDRmjIdv9T0WLVibMRRTk31hqxLUC-L6SlMJdYBhH6zwvzFK9_E1XeBFoxRF7M0GXnQYdQmH2XHb9igE6IfwjYODaEpOgs84s0pFdVCgb03dgpYMPvh-Pyy_GP_2DsVKC4P_ld_8Q%3D)**

Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.**To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology,[we need your answers to the AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=94ca2a087db1402a9dcac594a4879d68&_e=gNEMFenPLXAWDddqWzkpWV2_ZIdDM95kseSv-MDHCTlLZHZ7bDw8TN0IFeS1Y0ve0mqPoiAHCEFdaQtwYjaPsimj8Mge10CF1eo2dsGiOFc7QulkXb2zDWfZmTg7HFt2h5HPsAqLShITzjggzc6Ah2LQGUdsFPobbaonVF6PLKzEaUevfd7S6Uy6ohTgiqObizpWa2gyrVdKxDLVidD6YZBJ9WaofNiFR5SeKWSyxU8j0DdGqqQMzBStouWl2Z2hpYLnd0bkt_fwCirEFdbcA7HT0vh9HOlbcVdBJTbvdgQq2F2vKMRrcugG8Ev7IdDwumQ6rHaZgJe2ofHhBh8xh0SVPtigJ7WdE7D57eipwXEyoTY4Y64efBOzLlsXTIT5DlkLod5RN7OLhoMbVZuWwOfJqdP6766vkxTCfZyYxx9pu4wrFOaR7pDktdhdVnZKqxsx_vzTggDN0adeoy8o7AFc8U0mhYxdIOh5-LsYOGHlrWVy0etnkrZboZwIJhh2F9HVSVnKbVBzcTSyVcScclvjFmOU9HADQpkztJXw08pAEHoV-mi4OUaXMTEbncaxXOGZzQkRncCn3TG6hW2awStFjMSVT2JlsRfNflY7e5o%3D)**Thank you in advance for your help.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

| | Fellow Patriots, Thank you to my supporters, friends and family who helped me get to this moment. Our triumphant victory last night couldn’t have been possible without your time and devotion to this campaign, and I am eternally grateful. To the voters of Virginia District 62, thank you for placing your faith in me by granting me the Republican nomination for this seat. I reaffirm my promise to you to always be a staunch defender of your constitutional liberties and our way of life. As your Representative I will: [Fight to defend your God-given rights...](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/cfPU5amXn/c?w=UoUedqZrNxDOqZ69-SGQbHysHEcclU0ffjzK06Gm5TM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGFtaWx0b25mb3J2aXJnaW5pYS5jb20iLCJyIjoiNThjNDRmMDYtZjJiNy00NDE3LWIxYzUtNGY3NjY2ZWY5Njk3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDQyODg5MzMtZTRjYy00ZjEyLThmM2UtNmY0NWYzNzYyMWY0In0) [Respect your tax dollars by exercising fiscal restraint...](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/cfPU5amXn/c?w=UoUedqZrNxDOqZ69-SGQbHysHEcclU0ffjzK06Gm5TM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGFtaWx0b25mb3J2aXJnaW5pYS5jb20iLCJyIjoiNThjNDRmMDYtZjJiNy00NDE3LWIxYzUtNGY3NjY2ZWY5Njk3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDQyODg5MzMtZTRjYy00ZjEyLThmM2UtNmY0NWYzNzYyMWY0In0) [Preserve our rural values and community...](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/cfPU5amXn/c?w=UoUedqZrNxDOqZ69-SGQbHysHEcclU0ffjzK06Gm5TM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGFtaWx0b25mb3J2aXJnaW5pYS5jb20iLCJyIjoiNThjNDRmMDYtZjJiNy00NDE3LWIxYzUtNGY3NjY2ZWY5Njk3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDQyODg5MzMtZTRjYy00ZjEyLThmM2UtNmY0NWYzNzYyMWY0In0) To Clay Jackson, I want to commend you for a well run campaign and for your years of service on the Madison County Board of Supervisors. I hope to collaborate with you in my efforts to preserve and represent this incredible district. To all the business owners and families, you have my unwavering support and advocacy in keeping this the best place to live and raise a family. To Nick and Tina Freitas, thank you for your vigorous service to this district and all the years you have been in office. I hope to uphold the high standard of uncompromising character and courage that you have displayed. Thank you for placing your trust in me to represent so many amazing Virginians in this seat. Of course, this wouldn’t have been possible without the support of my family. Thank you for sticking with me along this journey. I know that it hasn’t been easy, but it truly means more than I can say. And to my outstanding husband Cameron, thank you for always standing by my side and being my rock through good times and bad. Most importantly, all glory to God. “The horse is prepared for battle, but the victory belongs to the Lord” Proverbs 21:31. I look forward to the months ahead in my endeavor to earn the trust of voters in this beautiful district we call home. Thank you and God bless,

To the voters of Virginia District 62, thank you for placing your faith in me by granting me the Republican nomination for this seat. I reaffirm my promise to you to always be a staunch defender of your constitutional liberties and our way of life. As your Representative I will: To Clay Jackson, I want to commend you for a well run campaign and for your years of service on the Madison County Board of Supervisors. I hope to collaborate with you in my efforts to preserve and represent this incredible district. To all the business owners and families, you have my unwavering support and advocacy in keeping this the best place to live and raise a family. To Nick and Tina Freitas, thank you for your vigorous service to this district and all the years you have been in office. I hope to uphold the high standard of uncompromising character and courage that you have displayed. Thank you for placing your trust in me to represent so many amazing Virginians in this seat. Of course, this wouldn’t have been possible without the support of my family. Thank you for sticking with me along this journey. I know that it hasn’t been easy, but it truly means more than I can say. And to my outstanding husband Cameron, thank you for always standing by my side and being my rock through good times and bad. Most importantly, all glory to God. “The horse is prepared for battle, but the victory belongs to the Lord” Proverbs 21:31. I look forward to the months ahead in my endeavor to earn the trust of voters in this beautiful district we call home. Our brand new sponsor ad rate sheet included! | | | – BY: We have three things for you to know about Must Read Texas as a current FREE subscriber: 1) You can SAVE TIME and be BETTER INFORMED by becoming a monthly paid subscriber for $7/mo . 2) You can SAVE TIME and be BETTER INFORMED by becoming a monthly paid subscriber for $70/yr (20% savings vs. monthly) . 3) For the first time ever, we are publishing sponsorship rates for BOTH of our popular newsletters — ATX Pulse (121,000+ subscribers) and Must Read Texas (516,000 subscribers). | » Interested in rates and availability? Email Matt . | BACKGROUND: Dear Must Read Texas reader: You receive the free version of the indispensable Must Read Texas morning email (325k+ subscribers!), which we spend several hours each weekday morning compiling. As you know, instead of the PAID version with complete story summaries to save you time, you now receive just the headlines and links. Our paid subscribers LOVE Must Read Texas, and we are confident you will too. To become a paid subscriber , please visit: » Subscriptions are $7/month or $70/year. Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

We see the military industrial complex gearing up to stuff their pockets with our money. People still watch Sean Hannity? Jesus! P.S. Iran Sucks! I'll never stop speaking the TRUTH. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109845622/552472594/1328794144?refcode=ea.92a678fd-a94c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.92a678fd-a94c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyYTY3OGZkLWE5NGMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=15IYPq2iWGVdt1_GYXWZbPy8QNyxYdLQpdS9ZXI4P40=&emci=fb0db43a-a34c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=92a678fd-a94c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

Team, If you’re feeling anxious about what’s happening in the Middle East, you’re not alone.

Tensions between Israel and Iran are growing—and Donald Trump is already beating the war drums. He and his MAGA allies are calling for U.S. military intervention without debate, without congressional approval, and without accountability.

Involving the United States in this escalating conflict between Israel and Iran would be a disastrous mistake. We would risk dragging our servicemembers into another endless war, inflame anti-American sentiment, and put countless civilian lives, and our planet at risk.

This moment calls for restraint, diplomacy, and level-headed leadership. Since none of those qualities exist in the White House at this time, we must rely on Congress to act.

Fortunately, in a rare bipartisan move, Reps. Thomas Massie and Ro Khanna introduced a War Powers Resolution in the House that would stop this reckless march to war in its tracks. The resolution would require the President to seek explicit approval from Congress for any hostilities towards Iran.

And in the Senate, Senator Tim Kaine introduced a similar resolution, while Senators Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren and Chris Van Hollen put forward a bill to prohibit funding for any offensive military measures against Iran without congressional authorization.

This isn’t just about foreign policy, partisanship or opposing Trump. It’s about preventing our involvement in another catastrophic war and protecting our democracy from executive overreach.

**[Click here to send a message to Congress now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109845623/552472595/-1405566489?refcode=ea.92a678fd-a94c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.92a678fd-a94c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyYTY3OGZkLWE5NGMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=15IYPq2iWGVdt1_GYXWZbPy8QNyxYdLQpdS9ZXI4P40=&emci=fb0db43a-a34c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=92a678fd-a94c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** and ask them to sign on to support these measures before it’s too late. After you send your letter, you’ll be redirected to our call tool so you can follow up with a phone call.

We’ve seen this story before. One lesson we should have learned by now is that the best time to stop any war is before it starts.

— JanePAC

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I'm ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
My name is Abigail Spanberger, and I'm the Democratic nominee for Governor in Virginia's general election.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89971?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X)
Peter, the polls are closed. Now, it's official:
**My name is Abigail Spanberger, and I'm the Democratic nominee for Governor in Virginia's general election.** I'm ready to flip the Governor's office blue this November, defeat Trump's agenda at the ballot box, and get to work creating a more affordable Commonwealth for all.
But one lesson I learned during my years in Congress and at CIA is that a strong team beats going at it alone every time, so I hope you will join my campaign today.
**[Will you become a founding member of my campaign for Governor by splitting a $10 contribution with State Democrats Committee? There's no bigger election this year than here in Virginia, and I feel the responsibility to set the tone by winning big — but I can only deliver if we raise the resources to air ads, hire organizers, and turn out voters.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89971?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89972?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89972?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89972?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89972?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89972?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89972?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89971?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X)
---
In a few short months, we can start Democrats on a winning streak by flipping Virginia blue.
_It's not going to be easy._
Four years ago, we lost this same Governor's race by _two points_ and saw years of progress erased in an instant. And my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears has shown she will indulge in fearmongering and disinformation to keep Virginia under Republican control.
Your contribution today, whatever the amount, will help us rise above the attacks and build a winning campaign that reflects our shared values.
If you're fed up with the chaos coming out of Washington, if you're outraged watching GOP officials bend their knee rather than uphold their oath, I am counting on your immediate and full support.
**[Click this link to complete your donation and become a founding member of my campaign for Governor.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89971?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X)** Together, we will flip Virginia blue and send a resounding message to this White House and beyond that voters will not stand for the corruption, the attacks on fundamental rights, and the brazen disregard for the needs of working families.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89971?refcode=em20250618-9025&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9025%2E614464%2ErAb06X)**
I'm honored by the trust you are placing in me. Virginia is where I grew up and where I'm raising my three girls, and I refuse to let far-right extremism win the day.
With immense gratitude,
Abigail Spanberger

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: this is the biggest fight of the 2026 election
body:
Georgia has been the tipping point in some of the biggest political fights of the last decade. Next election WILL be the same.
We've JUST learned that Trump’s allies are plotting a full-scale power grab in the MOST CRUCIAL SWING STATE of Georgia... and it’s ALREADY in motion!!!
A new report just revealed that Gov. Brian Kemp is quietly working to boost Trump’s preferred Senate candidate.
The goal? Flip Georgia red and cement Republican control of the Senate.
We’re doing everything we can to stop it — including launching a $60,000 fund to help shore up resources in Georgia and other battleground states. But we’re still $13,638 away from hitting our goal - can you help close the gap? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=061825_4]

name: Board President David Canepa
subject: There’s More Work Ahead — Join Me in What’s Next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1107d678c1&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | Dear Friend, I hope this note finds you well, and that your summer is off to a great start! As I reflect on my work serving San Mateo County, I am grateful for your continued support in helping me achieve so much for our community. Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, the environment, enhancing children, and saving family services. ** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=24ac977314&e=c0babbc643)** While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help create a better future. ** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=cc6eec5162&e=c0babbc643)**

I am eager to hear what’s most important to you as we continue working to make San Mateo County a place we are all proud to call home.

In friendship,

David Canepa
Board President, San Mateo County
[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=bd1328b6b2&e=c0babbc643) **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friend, I hope this note finds you well, and that your summer is off to a great start! As I reflect on my work serving San Mateo County, I am grateful for your continued support in helping me achieve so much for our community. Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, the environment, enhancing children, and saving family services. While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help create a better future. I am eager to hear what’s most important to you as we continue working to make San Mateo County a place we are all proud to call home. In friendship, David Canepa Board President, San Mateo County Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463 | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 20 PARK ROAD, SUITE E BURLINGAME, CA 94010-4443 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Flexing resistance. Building resilience. / Flexionando resistencia. Desarrollando resiliencia.
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
Joining millions in the streets against the Trump regime
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Protest%20No%20Kings.jpg]
When we speak out for the common good, we lift up communities and empower our friends, families, and neighbors. TOP proudly joined #NoKings protests and Juneteenth celebrations Saturday in Dallas, Houston, and San Antonio, in a showing of resistance and resilience in the face of a turbulent national political climate.
At TOP, we unapologetically organize and build power for Black and Latino Texans. The solidarity we build isn’t about feel-good moments. It’s forged in the trenches of struggle, through strategic collaboration, and in the understanding that our liberation is interconnected.
Showing up and engaging with our fellow community members is one vital way how we can fight Trump's authoritarianism and MAGA fascism.
View and share TOP pics from our weekend of action here. [https://www.facebook.com/OrganizeTexas/posts/pfbid02634ZyaNu4BSpmobm8HLBR5XAQAdp7Vv2FwBrRx7nT8XLLsLGhkhyS88VqAfFubMDl]
FRIDAY IN SAN ANTONIO:
Join us at ACT4SA's community legal fair
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/English%20flyer.jpg]
SAN ANTONIO: Come out this Friday, June 20, from 6 - 8 p.m. to ACT4SA's "Bailando Sin Miedo" Community Legal Fair , for an evening of free food, great music, and helpful resources on expunctions, warrant clinics, early probation termination, and more.
Help us spread the word!
Share the event flyer in English and Spanish on Facebook here. [https://www.facebook.com/act4satx/posts/pfbid02o1hA1GZS5C6KYUXW4U9v36nS6xsxP7M66NpyP9s9RkfLgTkUgPV3EhNd9BYuxYHTl]
To learn more about the event and TOP's legal reform work in Bexar County, contact Laquita at lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] .
JULY 10:
Dallas community dinner info session on local inflation Reduction Act funds
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/03%20Community%20Dinner.JPG]
Dallas County is getting millions of dollars from the federal government to help lower energy bills, fix homes, and create good-paying jobs as a result of President Biden's Inflation Reduction Act (IRA). But if we don’t speak up, that money could go to wealthy areas and big developers — not our communities. We’re organizing to make sure Black, Latino, and working-class families in Dallas get the support we deserve.
Join TOP on July 10 from 6 - 8 p.m. at the Beckley-Saner Rec. Center in Dallas for a family-friendly community event where we'll discuss how these IRA (Inflation Reduction Act) funds can benefit residents across Dallas County for years to come.
RSVP at toptx.us/ourmoney. [https://secure.everyaction.com/r5AdrDRdBEGm0Vv-N93R_w2]
For more information about this event and our IRA campaign in Dallas, contact Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
TOP Tip: Flying this summer?
Make sure you're REAL ID ready.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Updated%20Real%20ID%20pic.jpeg]
Double-check your ID cards before your next flight to avoid a possible headache at the airport. As of May 7, you now need a REAL ID-compliant drivers license with a gold star, a valid passport, or a U.S. military ID to travel by air in the U.S. Learn about the new REAL ID rule here. [https://www.npr.org/2025/05/05/nx-s1-5379935/real-id-tsa-tips-travel]
Español
Uniéndose a millones en las calles contra el régimen de Trump
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Protest%20No%20Kings.jpg]
Cuando alzamos la voz por el bien de la comunidad, impulsamos y empoderamos a nuestros amigos, familias y vecinos. TOP se unió con orgullo a las protestas #NoKings y a las celebraciones del Juneteenth el sábado en Dallas, Houston y San Antonio, en una muestra de resistencia y resiliencia ante un clima político nacional turbulento.
En TOP, organizamos y fortalecemos con fuerza en la comunidad negra y latina de Texas. La solidaridad que construimos no se trata solamente para momentos de bienestar. Se forja en las trincheras de la lucha, a través de la colaboración estratégica y en la comprensión de que nuestra liberación está interconectada.
Presentarse e interactuar con los miembros de nuestra comunidad es una forma vital de combatir el autoritarismo de Trump y el fascismo MAGA.
Vea y comparta fotos de TOP de nuestro fin de semana de acción aquí. [https://www.facebook.com/OrganizeTexas/posts/pfbid02634ZyaNu4BSpmobm8HLBR5XAQAdp7Vv2FwBrRx7nT8XLLsLGhkhyS88VqAfFubMDl]
VIERNES EN SAN ANTONIO:
Acompáñenos en la feria legal comunitaria de ACT4SA
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Spanish%20flyer%20Bexar%20County.jpg]
SAN ANTONIO: Ven este viernes 20 de junio, de 6 a 8 p. m., a la Feria Legal Comunitaria "Bailando Sin Miedo" de ACT4SA. Disfruta de una noche con comida gratis, buena música y recursos útiles sobre expurgaciones, talleres de órdenes de arresto, terminación anticipada de la libertad condicional y más.
¡Ayúdanos pasar el mensaje!
Comparte el folleto del evento en inglés y español en Facebook aquí. [https://www.facebook.com/act4satx/posts/pfbid02o1hA1GZS5C6KYUXW4U9v36nS6xsxP7M66NpyP9s9RkfLgTkUgPV3EhNd9BYuxYHTl]
Para obtener más información sobre el evento y el trabajo de reforma legal de TOP en el condado de Bexar, contacta a Laquita en lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] .
10 DE JULIO:
Cena comunitaria en Dallas: sesión informativa sobre los fondos locales de la Ley de Reducción de la Inflación
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/03%20Community%20Dinner.JPG]
El condado de Dallas está recibiendo millones de dólares del gobierno federal para ayudar a reducir las facturas de energía, reparar viviendas y crear empleos bien remunerados gracias a la Ley de Reducción de la Inflación (IRA) del presidente Biden. Pero si no nos pronunciamos, ese dinero podría ir a zonas adineradas y grandes promotoras inmobiliarias, no a nuestras comunidades. Estamos organizando para asegurar que las familias negras, latinas y de clase trabajadora de Dallas reciban el apoyo que merecen.
Únase a TOP el 10 de julio, de 6 a 8 p. m., en el Centro Recreativo Beckley-Saner de Dallas , para un evento comunitario para toda la familia donde hablaremos sobre cómo estos fondos de la IRA (Ley de Reducción de la Inflación) pueden beneficiar a los residentes de todo el condado de Dallas en los próximos años.
Confirme su asistencia en toptx.us/ourmoney. [https://secure.everyaction.com/r5AdrDRdBEGm0Vv-N93R_w2]
Para obtener más información sobre este evento y nuestra campaña de la IRA en Dallas, comuníquese con Iman en ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
Consejos de TOP: ¿ V as a volar este verano? Asegúrate de estar preparado para la REAl ID.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Updated%20Real%20ID%20pic.jpeg]
Revise sus documentos de identidad antes de su próximo vuelo para evitar posibles problemas en el aeropuerto. A partir del 7 de mayo, necesita una licencia de conducir que cumpla con la normativa REAL ID con una estrella dorada, un pasaporte válido o una identificación militar estadounidense para viajar en avión dentro de EE. UU. Infórmese sobre la nueva normativa REAL ID aquí. [https://www.npr.org/2025/05/05/nx-s1-5379935/real-id-tsa-tips-travel]
Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207

name: Dan Sullivan
subject: Ever notice how American-made is just better?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qB4qo4KlV6_dz19WEub1xA~~/AAVLBhA~/2gkyAhBPqk0T-Kk2-2UuiNaYQnLCh94-SOd5JGJ_8q8dDhK9l2VUAtRcfN1GbBQM-gubibMBAh4FEgr5AV7ZXuKpeFUb0B7iFymcqyFDNQTdB5VzYQY9soeB32EHxpapAJFnOlgSIkVBpNDA5LtPV5dE6aZ7Jyh0VyIsmlnaMA4FKaUWR4bUsAbM0GqXBdMftiL3QJEffH74g-KkurgETwXi27-4ad6G1Z9FDTDHUjl_DMfwNq6LcjUsmvYIKevyPdVypHqvy01IBdtHuKEZSk-S-FIzWxwXI653FYAY2m21h8XNTjkNpmCKtfIXpOgdJ2k8398dzO5PWyj5f66w4AopOnYkAGe0yyri25VtbK6FpoeuEnL9xRAvhxNuei-tFsLwDhoQMwNykILllVwj8A~~)

Hey, it's Alaska Senator, Dan Sullivan.

This past weekend, I was reflecting on why I got into politics. I ran to bring the values of Alaska and the Marine Corps to the U.S. Senate. I ran to get big things done for Alaska and our country. I ran to rebuild our military, unleash our tremendous energy potential, and slash bureaucratic red tape. And I ran because I'm a father who wanted my three daughters to grow up in an America that still makes things.

I'm a husband who believes in doing the hard work it takes to build a strong family and strong country. And I'm a Marine who's never backed down from a fight when something is worth defending.

_Right now, that fight is here at home - bringing American manufacturing back where it belongs._
[Support American Manufacturing Now!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qB4qo4KlV6_dz19WEub1xA~~/AAVLBhA~/2gkyAhBPqk0T-Kk2-2UuiNaYQnLCh94-SOd5JGJ_8q8dDhK9l2VUAtRcfN1GbBQM-gubibMBAh4FEgr5AV7ZXuKpeFUb0B7iFymcqyFDNQTdB5VzYQY9soeB32EHxpapAJFnOlgSIkVBpNDA5LtPV5dE6aZ7Jyh0VyIsmlnaMA4FKaUWR4bUsAbM0GqXBdMftiL3QJEffH74g-KkurgETwXi27-4ad6G1Z9FDTDHUjl_DMfwNq6LcjUsmvYIKevyPdVypHqvy01IBdtHuKEZSk-S-FIzWxwXI653FYAY2m21h8XNTjkNpmCKtfIXpOgdJ2k8398dzO5PWyj5f66w4AopOnYkAGe0yyri25VtbK6FpoeuEnL9xRAvhxNuei-tFsLwDhoQMwNykILllVwj8A~~)
I've seen too many towns across our country that have been hollowed out by bad trade deals and a mindset that we should outsource everything. I reject that. I believe in **[Made in the USA.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qB4qo4KlV6_dz19WEub1xA~~/AAVLBhA~/2gkyAhBPqk0T-Kk2-2UuiNaYQnLCh94-SOd5JGJ_8q8dDhK9l2VUAtRcfN1GbBQM-gubibMBAh4FEgr5AV7ZXuKpeFUb0B7iFymcqyFDNQTdB5VzYQY9soeB32EHxpapAJFnOlgSIkVBpNDA5LtPV5dE6aZ7Jyh0VyIsmlnaMA4FKaUWR4bUsAbM0GqXBdMftiL3QJEffH74g-KkurgETwXi27-4ad6G1Z9FDTDHUjl_DMfwNq6LcjUsmvYIKevyPdVypHqvy01IBdtHuKEZSk-S-FIzWxwXI653FYAY2m21h8XNTjkNpmCKtfIXpOgdJ2k8398dzO5PWyj5f66w4AopOnYkAGe0yyri25VtbK6FpoeuEnL9xRAvhxNuei-tFsLwDhoQMwNykILllVwj8A~~)** I wear it, I drive it, and I fight for policies that support it.

But I can't do this alone.

If you believe in restoring American strength by rebuilding American industry - if you want to see more products stamped **["Made in the USA"](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qB4qo4KlV6_dz19WEub1xA~~/AAVLBhA~/2gkyAhBPqk0T-Kk2-2UuiNaYQnLCh94-SOd5JGJ_8q8dDhK9l2VUAtRcfN1GbBQM-gubibMBAh4FEgr5AV7ZXuKpeFUb0B7iFymcqyFDNQTdB5VzYQY9soeB32EHxpapAJFnOlgSIkVBpNDA5LtPV5dE6aZ7Jyh0VyIsmlnaMA4FKaUWR4bUsAbM0GqXBdMftiL3QJEffH74g-KkurgETwXi27-4ad6G1Z9FDTDHUjl_DMfwNq6LcjUsmvYIKevyPdVypHqvy01IBdtHuKEZSk-S-FIzWxwXI653FYAY2m21h8XNTjkNpmCKtfIXpOgdJ2k8398dzO5PWyj5f66w4AopOnYkAGe0yyri25VtbK6FpoeuEnL9xRAvhxNuei-tFsLwDhoQMwNykILllVwj8A~~)** and fewer jobs shipped overseas - then I hope you'll stand with me today.
[PLEDGE TO BUY AMERICAN TODAY](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qB4qo4KlV6_dz19WEub1xA~~/AAVLBhA~/2gkyAhBPqk0T-Kk2-2UuiNaYQnLCh94-SOd5JGJ_8q8dDhK9l2VUAtRcfN1GbBQM-gubibMBAh4FEgr5AV7ZXuKpeFUb0B7iFymcqyFDNQTdB5VzYQY9soeB32EHxpapAJFnOlgSIkVBpNDA5LtPV5dE6aZ7Jyh0VyIsmlnaMA4FKaUWR4bUsAbM0GqXBdMftiL3QJEffH74g-KkurgETwXi27-4ad6G1Z9FDTDHUjl_DMfwNq6LcjUsmvYIKevyPdVypHqvy01IBdtHuKEZSk-S-FIzWxwXI653FYAY2m21h8XNTjkNpmCKtfIXpOgdJ2k8398dzO5PWyj5f66w4AopOnYkAGe0yyri25VtbK6FpoeuEnL9xRAvhxNuei-tFsLwDhoQMwNykILllVwj8A~~)
Your support helps me keep up the fight - not just in Washington, but in every community across our great state that's ready to roll up its sleeves and get to work.

**[\- Dan Sullivan](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qB4qo4KlV6_dz19WEub1xA~~/AAVLBhA~/2gkyAhBPqk0T-Kk2-2UuiNaYQnLCh94-SOd5JGJ_8q8dDhK9l2VUAtRcfN1GbBQM-gubibMBAh4FEgr5AV7ZXuKpeFUb0B7iFymcqyFDNQTdB5VzYQY9soeB32EHxpapAJFnOlgSIkVBpNDA5LtPV5dE6aZ7Jyh0VyIsmlnaMA4FKaUWR4bUsAbM0GqXBdMftiL3QJEffH74g-KkurgETwXi27-4ad6G1Z9FDTDHUjl_DMfwNq6LcjUsmvYIKevyPdVypHqvy01IBdtHuKEZSk-S-FIzWxwXI653FYAY2m21h8XNTjkNpmCKtfIXpOgdJ2k8398dzO5PWyj5f66w4AopOnYkAGe0yyri25VtbK6FpoeuEnL9xRAvhxNuei-tFsLwDhoQMwNykILllVwj8A~~)**

** **

[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/VFtLDz9KUb8rPg1pEqeInw~~/AAVLBhA~/kfHPbwkfX57Qb_4k4ziJla3UUHBnQ6xEk4zgsK_9HSpYDTkP8WZyr1NN_pQrsUUuFeEmN00YddOF0qFLrVGLU46XwSluQCVo0pI7PrV_QRoRTc7ChY6DkzUGIUY6ce_JNEiLk4sg8dtBoUFv2bO5EA~~)

clean_body: ~~ Hey, it's Alaska Senator, Dan Sullivan. This past weekend, I was reflecting on why I got into politics. I ran to bring the values of Alaska and the Marine Corps to the U.S. Senate. I ran to get big things done for Alaska and our country. I ran to rebuild our military, unleash our tremendous energy potential, and slash bureaucratic red tape. And I ran because I'm a father who wanted my three daughters to grow up in an America that still makes things. I'm a husband who believes in doing the hard work it takes to build a strong family and strong country. And I'm a Marine who's never backed down from a fight when something is worth defending. Right now, that fight is here at home - bringing American manufacturing back where it belongs. ~~ I've seen too many towns across our country that have been hollowed out by bad trade deals and a mindset that we should outsource everything. I reject that. I believe in ~~ I wear it, I drive it, and I fight for policies that support it. But I can't do this alone. If you believe in restoring American strength by rebuilding American industry - if you want to see more products stamped ~~ and fewer jobs shipped overseas - then I hope you'll stand with me today. ~~ Your support helps me keep up the fight - not just in Washington, but in every community across our great state that's ready to roll up its sleeves and get to work. ~~ ~~ | Paid for by the NRSC. name: Kevin Roberts
subject: A free eBook for you
body:
Do you know the truth about the Declaration of Independence?

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpev3t5m0dbjtumhp8cp4jq181umjbab9p97h688_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

Do you know the truth about the Declaration of Independence?

This revolutionary document laid down the foundation of American political thought, far before our Founding Fathers won the Revolutionary War and wrote the Constitution.
---
|
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4pt4ef4t2ds9rklnujl6s7sreqsnlrov5nei6l0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2clh2bs)
---
| | In an era where the radical Left has attacked our individual liberty and America’s founding ideals, all Americans should have a robust understanding of this document, and the principles found within.

**That’s why our policy experts at The Heritage Foundation created[ _The Guide to the Declaration of Independence eBook_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zna0b9l37fce9qrv2ik3cqa3e488ldunqq7viin0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2clh2bs).**

This FREE eBook breaks down this important founding document’s history, including:
* Why our Founders decided to declare independence.
* The writing process for the Declaration.
* The philosophical tradition that informed our Founding Fathers’ thinking.
* How the Declaration affected American politics.
* And much more!

This eBook is an essential tool for all American patriots who want to learn more about our nation’s founding principles.

**You can get your FREE digital copy using the secure link below.**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/guide-to-the-declaration-ebook/](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkdbjmhonq8qcn1s4osm54tm9uhv28p81538n2t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2clh2bs)**

I hope you find it both informative and edifying.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Breaking Campaign News >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend, the Democrats are piling into my race to defeat me, and their reasons are crystal clear...They’re coming after me because I stand firm for our values.

**[🚨 BREAKING 🚨](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlmnbvhob5g2lri7drvuojuev371cmegro485k1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)
[NEW DEMOCRAT OPPONENT ENTERS THE RACE](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0ul4i7eesfimlqje6d8lckluukgq26s4n6a1ln0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)**
_Democrats are lining up to defeat me._
[](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlo8bqfnkfloalq2p24eoooiopu3qh617hi6ia18_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)
Friend, the Democrats are piling into my race to defeat me, and their reasons are crystal clear:
1. **[I proudly support President Trump.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7iarkvge6qn2se3ggijgej02l6n87osfau7f7cg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)**
2. **[I'm a steadfast conservative.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg4mumv3ko5vatjagdpim7s7jufeeuggmfnm7bb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)**

_**[That's it.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkjcs6joh1cmbmqh19mo2hd7kmnio757qtt6qrb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)**_ They're coming after me because I stand firm for our values.

But I won't shy away from tough competition. **[In 2020, my opponent raised $132 MILLION to defeat me, and _it didn 't work._](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjrqt1de4hn96sber5432h14e6g809sdh57jm8e0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)**

I'm sure my new opponents will use the same playbook to try to defeat me, but nobody will outwork me or my team. **[We won't stop until we win for South Carolina.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2p7uo5nsoqbh62c97etpg7fvcgtamj7ufs61nf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)**

I know that the fight will be tough, but I am lucky. I have the support of true conservatives from across our state and nation who are ready to stand up and fight with me, however, we cannot take anything for granted.

**[Friend, I need your help NOW, as the opposition begins to line up.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze1tjc94102g5tccb2qknv6rseegi071o6a97f80_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)**

We saw how hard the Democrats and opposition went after candidates in 2024 for supporting President Trump and standing up for our values, and I'm sure 2026 will be no different.
[🚨 STAND AGAINST THE OPPOSITION 🚨](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg5qv0mmtpv6ivo4hndsuq4se71cl9e6jjqit44o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)
Please, help however you can before my opponents start ramping up their attacks, and we risk falling behind.
[RUSH IN $5](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zko38j3pgjfmcnjnreirkme6e71fl80kuvv8ulig_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)
[RUSH IN $25](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zeblp8lbfbko1acqh23ok9qn5tp0so8b4iipv3ho_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)
[RUSH IN $50](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5ahnste51i9vp5ipjmjma68jctina05mj3jknv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)
[RUSH IN $150](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc8s4fak6bvep5a74o1fskgie7cp2a1h903j0bv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)
[RUSH IN MORE](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdiccuu571783mf51ef7gu0ns58rsu34ecmd1lm0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph6eoj2cdh2bs)
Friend, I am counting on you.

Sincerely,

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: A free eBook for you
body:
Do you know the truth about the Declaration of Independence?

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc3ggo85507f0ibc5l4uv88jmlbil8di2h3edn60_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph61p32c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

Do you know the truth about the Declaration of Independence?

This revolutionary document laid down the foundation of American political thought, far before our Founding Fathers won the Revolutionary War and wrote the Constitution.
---
|
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp5o7pdt061qotnr1t851tpg9e2tvina230h33k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph61p32c5h2bs)
---
| | In an era where the radical Left has attacked our individual liberty and America’s founding ideals, all Americans should have a robust understanding of this document, and the principles found within.

**That’s why our policy experts at The Heritage Foundation created[ _The Guide to the Declaration of Independence eBook_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1fanrevndlobrjec1rn77f61l8fdlli6q6nb6c8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cph61p32c5h2bs).**

This FREE eBook breaks down this important founding document’s history, including:
* Why our Founders decided to declare independence.
* The writing process for the Declaration.
* The philosophical tradition that informed our Founding Fathers’ thinking.
* How the Declaration affected American politics.
* And much more!

This eBook is an essential tool for all American patriots who want to learn more about our nation’s founding principles.
