name: James O'Keefe
subject: Help me and Tucker Carlson
body:
I risked my life to get this footage from the border.

| | | Help me and Tucker Carlson today.
---
| |
#
---
From the desk of
---
# [James O'Keefe](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2lrih21o8dk6m6611bqduq4i5e8sebb0mgc8ev0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)
---
|
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, I risked my life to get this footage from the border. Jumping aboard a moving freight train filled with Venezuelan migrants in the dead of night... being detained by the Mexican national guard ... and even sneaking into a secret child encampment in Texas that housed unaccompanied children. **Anyone who has seen what I’ve seen and still resists****President Trump on securing the border, deporting criminal illegals, and designating cartels as foreign terrorist organizations is _leading_ _America_ _down_ _a_ _dangerous_ _path_.** That’s why I’m writing to you today with this personal request. [Will you click here to make your _**“LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution**_ in the next 48 hours? Help me and Tucker Carlson distribute this soul-wrenching documentary, fuel our other critical investigations, _and_ sound a clarion call to fix the gaping wound that is America’s immigration crisis.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9i259mud823bsrv61g2iv7nh2e0np5usulnulf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)
---
[ **Donate **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcsh3e7p96mgede933l4j9sc6r99kaeodd2o7ut0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)
---
I interviewed border patrol agents who were extremely emotional and who clearly had reached their breaking point... not long after we came across a little girl standing alone in the desert in the middle of the night completely abandoned. This left me more convinced than ever that when it comes to the border, there are only two kinds of Americans. 1\. Those who _are_ outraged and already demanding it be secured; and 2\. Those who _will_ be outraged and demand it be secured once they come face to face with the threat posed by the 11.5 million migrants who illegally crossed our border over the last four years – a shocking 650,000 with criminal backgrounds (including 14,944 murders and 20,061 charged with sexual assault)
---
| | I traveled to this warzone. I saw with my own eyes. And I did all this so you wouldn’t have to. I also did this after being repeatedly struck in the face by the reality that __nothing__ will change until the second group of people I described a moment ago __wake up__ and stop their __complacency__. That’s exactly what this documentary has the power to do. Correction. That’s exactly what _you_ have the power to do. My friend, this is why I joined forces with Tucker Carlson to promote and distribute **“LINE IN THE SAND”**. We must continue to investigate what is really happening at our Southern Border. Here’s the problem. It’s one we can’t overcome alone. You see, our open southern border is much more than a national security threat...it’s big business. I call it the “migrant industrial complex.” Let’s connect those dots:
---
**_Your tax dollars_**** _→_**** _NGO’s masquerading as churches →_**** _Cartels_**** _→ _All of it_ under the eye (and protection) of local law enforcement_**
---
| | This isn’t conjecture. It’s reality...
---
_A reality_ that one of OMG’s undercover journalists (alias Caesar) working with Citizen Journalism Foundation experienced as he was held at gunpoint by cartel members after he infiltrated a border encampment in the middle of the Aravaca Desert – a site being operated by an NGO (non-governmental organization) affiliated with the Unitarian Universalist Church. _A reality_ I experienced when Pima County deputies threatened to arrest me for exposing a bus filled with illegal immigrants being brought to the Ramada Hotel. _A reality_ that is captured and documented on film by going inside a cartel tunnel, interviewing border patrol agents, climbing aboard a moving freight train with migrants from Venezuela, and uncovering the horrors of babies getting run over and children being drugged so they could be smuggled across the border in silence.
---
_Our New President gets it. Tom Homan and Kristi Noem get it. They’ve been relentless._ But you know who doesn’t report this? **The legacy media in America****.** The actions that you take over the next 5 minutes will play a huge role in whether we have the resources to continue with the powerful citizen journalism that made “**LINE IN THE SAND”** possible. It’s that simple. [Today, I’m asking you to make your **“LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution** using this link in the next 48 hours to join Citizen Journalism Foundation in the fight that will determine whether, at the end of the day, you and I still have a country.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm0qu6acfff14voil3rl7me9po8par78qu8f3jsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs) Oh, there may be a place on the map called “ _the United States_.” But, whether the idea of America (and the freedom it has represented for the last 249 years) will survive? That part depends on what _you_ do today. Because the very first freedom – the Freedom of Speech and a Free Press upon which all other freedoms rest – is being chipped away. And not little by little. But massive cracks and fissures are happening each and every day. [That’s the reason I’m writing so urgently to request your help today and use this link to make your **“LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7gb51r4co1ru7ckljgrqjf6mjgj4scvrtrjek3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)**.** People familiar with our multi-part border investigation keep texting me, asking if I fear for my life. Here is my response: I’m _not_ suicidal. But I’m also not afraid to die. At 40, I’ve lived a good life. Whether it’s complete or not is not up to me. What happens next, I don’t know. If there’s more to come here, so be it. I’ve learned the pursuit of truth requires extreme risk while operating without a safety net. Meteoric highs, extreme lows, and near-death experiences, jail and jury trials, constant travel, adventures, travails, failures, betrayals, repeated valleys, moving and climbing mountains, enduring multiple rebirths and renewals. Which leads me to the border videos I've released and the wider mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation – the mission is to discover other people whose principles are not for sale and who will do the right thing rather than talk about doing the right thing. I’m tired of seeing tens-of-thousands of people message me privately about how bad things are... and then they make excuses or do nothing. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z838ufh2u1nth0pikep1cr12kuv3pijonbi6gpd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8u3po12q3q72nvi4pgmop29200qcv5fhbpjuu30_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)[My friend, I know that’s not you. Again, that’s why I’m asking you to use this link to make your “**LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution** in the next 48 hours.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkn0ntsa13l0b1gdrem4pbebpnk9pjgeii8i5mto_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs) **_You see, the truth is the only thing the enemies of freedom hate more than one citizen journalist is an entire army of citizen journalists doing the work “the media” is supposed to do._** The mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation is promoting these truths and providing this desperately needed transparency. I have to tell you, so far, this border investigation takes the prize as one of the most dangerous operations I’ve ever been involved with. _Cartel members pointing guns at our undercover reporter._ _ __Sheriff’s deputies threatening jail-time.__ _ _And, after our reporter escaped the Cartel encampment, I personally_ _donned a bullet-proof vest and “press” badge to exfiltrate our reporter, who was on the point of blacking-out when we finally got him in the vehicle._ I’ll tell you pointblank... The entire operation was a reality check for me and for our OMG team. And we’re not backing down. Uncovering the truth is too important. It’s worth the fight. It’s worth the sacrifice. If you agree, good. I need you to join me. That’s why I’m urging you to rush me your “**LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution** before you do anything else today. I need to hear from you within the next 48 hours so we can conduct even more undercover investigations, and fully execute our blueprint for training and equipping our army of Citizen Journalists. [Please use this link to make one-time tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9m32j54hod60lrbgshgrs5761kb753c551ftd7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs) I’m counting on your help to expose the corruption on our southern border _and_ in big government, big tech, big banks, big media, and big pharma. It won’t be easy. As I mentioned the retaliation I – and those citizen journalists working alongside me – will face is well-documented. [So, it personally means a lot to have you by my side in this fight. And if you’re able to make a larger contribution using this link – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more, it’ll add rocket fuel to the fire.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7d0oif811bmgq4eosn5abgf2em1cbi86pp0devg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs) Our vital mission cannot continue without your support. So, whether you can send $35 or more, please make your “**LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution** in the next 48 hours using the button below.
---
| | [ **Donate **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv55jh4cq5s1j1mlk5oamvekr4h2cgro03imjcao_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)
---
With Sincere Thanks,
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvd4jus7ab7qtb1j3clk52opi5nilbrvva7ku4to_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)
---
**James O'Keefe****CEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp8hps487q9tojenmqqc3easlv73ni16sl4obheo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3p9ean3u3napvj6lah4qh6becpveh1792ltnevo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zehgc6u7uuqr88ijbvs2stc4ti4u846kticsq3t0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o72c1h2bs)
---
**James O'Keefe****CEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation**

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlgvrpikbrkjpimt6bhsr9g85ne9adcslkh4aajg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdqdujpt7k9d1hjigbh53u0ms98bspf9n4g9mhn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj53dbq5v9t9ac2hik24q3v5einmhkatna2s873o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhmugf00dv1vk6o31ong54og0htnh7s94itflaog_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjgbq2ucia3i0lbq93m7dide4mvciqk0o6bjb1mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[Will you click here to make your _**“LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution**_ in the next 48 hours? Help me and Tucker Carlson distribute this soul-wrenching documentary, fuel our other critical investigations, _and_ sound a clarion call to fix the gaping wound that is America’s immigration crisis.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7umg126vou7pjva5kri0ukmfv50v7ttslcu9geg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs)
---
[ **Donate **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs9eefktlk24bk8dinvf0b1478mqbpcqal5pqoeo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs)
---
I interviewed border patrol agents who were extremely emotional and who clearly had reached their breaking point... not long after we came across a little girl standing alone in the desert in the middle of the night completely abandoned. This left me more convinced than ever that when it comes to the border, there are only two kinds of Americans. 1\. Those who _are_ outraged and already demanding it be secured; and 2\. Those who _will_ be outraged and demand it be secured once they come face to face with the threat posed by the 11.5 million migrants who illegally crossed our border over the last four years – a shocking 650,000 with criminal backgrounds (including 14,944 murders and 20,061 charged with sexual assault)
---
| | I traveled to this warzone. I saw with my own eyes. And I did all this so you wouldn’t have to. I also did this after being repeatedly struck in the face by the reality that __nothing__ will change until the second group of people I described a moment ago __wake up__ and stop their __complacency__. That’s exactly what this documentary has the power to do. Correction. That’s exactly what _you_ have the power to do. My friend, this is why I joined forces with Tucker Carlson to promote and distribute **“LINE IN THE SAND”**. We must continue to investigate what is really happening at our Southern Border. Here’s the problem. It’s one we can’t overcome alone. You see, our open southern border is much more than a national security threat...it’s big business. I call it the “migrant industrial complex.” Let’s connect those dots:
---
**_Your tax dollars_**** _→_**** _NGO’s masquerading as churches →_**** _Cartels_**** _→ _All of it_ under the eye (and protection) of local law enforcement_**
---
| | This isn’t conjecture. It’s reality...
---
_A reality_ that one of OMG’s undercover journalists (alias Caesar) working with Citizen Journalism Foundation experienced as he was held at gunpoint by cartel members after he infiltrated a border encampment in the middle of the Aravaca Desert – a site being operated by an NGO (non-governmental organization) affiliated with the Unitarian Universalist Church. _A reality_ I experienced when Pima County deputies threatened to arrest me for exposing a bus filled with illegal immigrants being brought to the Ramada Hotel. _A reality_ that is captured and documented on film by going inside a cartel tunnel, interviewing border patrol agents, climbing aboard a moving freight train with migrants from Venezuela, and uncovering the horrors of babies getting run over and children being drugged so they could be smuggled across the border in silence.
---
_Our New President gets it. Tom Homan and Kristi Noem get it. They’ve been relentless._ But you know who doesn’t report this? **The legacy media in America****.** The actions that you take over the next 5 minutes will play a huge role in whether we have the resources to continue with the powerful citizen journalism that made “**LINE IN THE SAND”** possible. It’s that simple. [Today, I’m asking you to make your **“LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution** using this link in the next 48 hours to join Citizen Journalism Foundation in the fight that will determine whether, at the end of the day, you and I still have a country.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za2u58v59587sdrp4h5tkhh1n802ka7smvo9mao0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs) Oh, there may be a place on the map called “ _the United States_.” But, whether the idea of America (and the freedom it has represented for the last 249 years) will survive? That part depends on what _you_ do today. Because the very first freedom – the Freedom of Speech and a Free Press upon which all other freedoms rest – is being chipped away. And not little by little. But massive cracks and fissures are happening each and every day. [That’s the reason I’m writing so urgently to request your help today and use this link to make your **“LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z43jdocsohi8surscb2gi3cn4jguu1o19ii75ctg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs)**.** People familiar with our multi-part border investigation keep texting me, asking if I fear for my life. Here is my response: I’m _not_ suicidal. But I’m also not afraid to die. At 40, I’ve lived a good life. Whether it’s complete or not is not up to me. What happens next, I don’t know. If there’s more to come here, so be it. I’ve learned the pursuit of truth requires extreme risk while operating without a safety net. Meteoric highs, extreme lows, and near-death experiences, jail and jury trials, constant travel, adventures, travails, failures, betrayals, repeated valleys, moving and climbing mountains, enduring multiple rebirths and renewals. Which leads me to the border videos I've released and the wider mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation – the mission is to discover other people whose principles are not for sale and who will do the right thing rather than talk about doing the right thing. I’m tired of seeing tens-of-thousands of people message me privately about how bad things are... and then they make excuses or do nothing. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkg1l7dgf752m1ie85dnqi9tgbr1f40o55jrkao8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs)[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi0bv5vr8t94jeodj4qtefcbp4t7ntg2r6deoug0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs)[My friend, I know that’s not you. Again, that’s why I’m asking you to use this link to make your “**LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution** in the next 48 hours.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1maj7kgd8oui9epm7582m18fb6mats8jc70tce0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs) **_You see, the truth is the only thing the enemies of freedom hate more than one citizen journalist is an entire army of citizen journalists doing the work “the media” is supposed to do._** The mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation is promoting these truths and providing this desperately needed transparency. I have to tell you, so far, this border investigation takes the prize as one of the most dangerous operations I’ve ever been involved with. _Cartel members pointing guns at our undercover reporter._ _ __Sheriff’s deputies threatening jail-time.__ _ _And, after our reporter escaped the Cartel encampment, I personally_ _donned a bullet-proof vest and “press” badge to exfiltrate our reporter, who was on the point of blacking-out when we finally got him in the vehicle._ I’ll tell you pointblank... The entire operation was a reality check for me and for our OMG team. And we’re not backing down. Uncovering the truth is too important. It’s worth the fight. It’s worth the sacrifice. If you agree, good. I need you to join me. That’s why I’m urging you to rush me your “**LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution** before you do anything else today. I need to hear from you within the next 48 hours so we can conduct even more undercover investigations, and fully execute our blueprint for training and equipping our army of Citizen Journalists. [Please use this link to make one-time tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkpinh7jfutp0g2atn3sb5e8n5pimi2gd7dq3i0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs) I’m counting on your help to expose the corruption on our southern border _and_ in big government, big tech, big banks, big media, and big pharma. It won’t be easy. As I mentioned the retaliation I – and those citizen journalists working alongside me – will face is well-documented. [So, it personally means a lot to have you by my side in this fight. And if you’re able to make a larger contribution using this link – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more, it’ll add rocket fuel to the fire.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1hsblkh0dlhi7cutp7aciq58otj1j3rteivqp0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj60o76c1h2bs) Our vital mission cannot continue without your support. So, whether you can send $35 or more, please make your “**LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution** in the next 48 hours using the button below.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We’re at the inflection point
body:
It’s gametime. What happens now decides it all.

It’s gametime. What happens now decides it all.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ojs590rh8lf6llllfg3lf0cllh06k91mi1ga2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj68pr2c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I recently shared a major update with you: The battle for the House Majority has fallen within the **_margin of error_**.
---
_Right now, we’re at the inflection point that will decide which way the toss-up falls._
---
**_Democrats are convinced that their showdown with President Trump over illegal immigration raids in blue states across America will be the key to flipping the House..._**
---
**_...And they’re BETTING IT ALL on the belief that they’re right._**
---
But just like you, I know in my heart that they’re dead WRONG.
---
Every voter I talk to absolutely stands by the President’s actions on illegal immigration.
---
_But, at the end of the day, we can cite every focus group saying we’re right until we’re blue in the face – the _ONLY_ thing that matters is the final vote tally at the ballot box._
---
**And to win at the ballot box, we need a 100% verified, up-to-date voter file. No ands, ifs, or buts about it.**
---
Friend, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
**That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats.**
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgf035l6icrfmci1vh205lnr1ksopo95jrvvrqpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpj68pr2c5h2bs)

---

Thank you,

# Thursday, June 19, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1910, the [first Father’s Day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAQQL_G3rAODCYZGLpkS9eO1sUcNgnhIiCJ_PdV20_o9qb3pPd1ns8YU8zrJ97JtcBzpndN1BqVOWHCG5VaOfnCF271WVbijLMCZQRMQh5njzHts-69C0SKxp6ctAZGZScL_eamg6XlYkNQpJZRm2nUBvGoDQJ5MEsf3Y8NJnmUAFYfBoWeAhg7SnmAxVw6DeRj4zJcOea2UUg7v6gMC9_75LbWHrUbPzp16tSpPjjEgcv6xzfMJBqLtpF4c0leBGwblSo87lVIacROWMSVnyXT3qlTX5x_vGNKsU6207DeMabfVPvXn5dT3wEAAP__2AN6ww) was celebrated in Spokane, Washington. Sonora Smart Dodd created the holiday to honor her father, a Civil War veteran who raised her and her five brothers after their mother died during childbirth. Yesterday, we asked how you read _The Flyover,_ and you delivered. Almost all readers responded that they read it from top to bottom, while a few confessed to skimming—we see you, headline hunters! We loved hearing from you and feel lucky to be part of your daily routine. Today's sponsor is [Dr. Steven Gundry MD](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M2KwjAUxfGnSXeW5OarXWQxIHWlDMOAyxLNTZsxNpJEi28_dF5h9j_Ogf_5OB5tiGGZTvaOpvo0LriWiLViHqON9oa5lBRdTpdUyzNPmBY7AgW5o2rH-tHZEN-jaJzxiIC8QcO0pBy00rSZjZdSdBZEp4Bz0KD6TjIvhPOIkqFqgtnWqGI9o1SLrgXr0FOpOWMdvcoLERRdqCm3PyksdUYf3-mFub2mexPNXOujEP5BYCAwrOvazrcH1ppvy7QRAsPXQZ9OewIDP-rvw-d5o3x4Bkf4XmtFQJXnhRG-V6LXTTbusYYYQ1GaCDrdbYh_X_VfgV4GfgMAAP__gIN13Q), offering health and nutrition advice in today's edition.

## Trump Reportedly OKs Iran War Plan
[President Trump has approved military strike](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu2zAQRL-G6tbgQy8XKtwoRXDTBkgjrMylvdcrUiBpC_77wPmFdAMMMJhzfn8tX8jC8fYLN5pqSEukowjVSnkRFHxQLiWJz2lNtTzzjVLExWrbge7BnBePLO-lbfwUiCy5hiYzdNrZoR90c5_G8zCG0Zpxddg7b4Lx3Yqj8-SCJesanj5rujdno_XQjieLnoLuBmfMqK_dqlpNnmvKp-_Esd4pyDu9KJ-uaWtkute6F-Uuys7KzsdxnLYSP52yM0V4FmXnD5Sy856EK18_sebntkMlkQLIngrcqUB6eOCMEbBWvD5gF4wF1mcFLuBJ8M3xBoEjCqTsKcNRvpWdMcPlYn78aX-2TZ78frAIl35Qrb5tyPLvav0vv6_J_g0AAP__9FeQ-w) plans against Iran but is delaying execution, _The Wall Street Journal_ reported Wednesday. Following a Situation Room meeting Tuesday night, Trump said he would wait to see if Tehran backs down from its nuclear ambitions before issuing a final order. Tehran warned that such involvement could [trigger “all-out war.”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdEbGGEwKF39Dl7-9Ei14nfiyYLQ2QXn7E_cK1400oxnN93Wf7hApbo__sKIrIU0bnpmwFOSJgOCFnHMiz2lOJR_8wLTBpJXupOplc5s8RPpMpvIuIGpsK3SN7VSrbW9V9XQGgjGdD3bo7KB6mNHMFvrBBwse8FZFd7Wpvrk1Slkz1Bo8BtXZtmkGtXSzMAp9LInr7xS38sRAn_RGrpe0VuSepexZtP-EHoUez_OslzlfLy5f6PGSQo-RYZMxMyDJE1geWRY-1l1ux0IILHMsmCXH_JJAJNNRrpzQY8XO72ckirm3wqjHCpF-x8ufiL2d_gkAAP__eR-CUg) While Israel and Iran have already traded blows for six days, Iran’s most fortified nuclear sites—buried deep beneath mountains—remain untouched and are largely impervious to conventional weapons. Meanwhile, [foreign ministers from Germany, France, and Britain](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb3u1DAQxJ8m6fZkO59XpDgEofrTUABVtLHXyXKOHdnOhXt7FF6BbqWfdkYz8-Nj-kB27JdvuNGQbZg8nclRzhQnhw6fFFMKzsQwh5yOuFDwOCmhGhAtyPtkkN17qkszWCJFVUmD7BpRqa7tRLkOtkVt-9liJ0RjtOjmezv30lJdzdZgX_JwqYlW3qUQXd3fFBqyoukqKXuhm7moBRnOId5-B_Z5Jeve4UXxpsNWumHNeU9F9SjUWKjxPM_blvzFCjWShyMVatyD48z6Opfr1W_k88X_aHckfhHQEcNO6GFjzylTTJADrMEZ8Id2hBEyumeCk_MKHNFD8GAjG3wDe1jI0wshhSNqgoTvywsjPB7y66-f8ktRjUGzKarPn6626UzfKe5lHMx-snOc2q6oxbIhu3-58n-N8RrU3wAAAP__QOajPw) are set to meet Iran’s top diplomat Friday in Geneva, aiming to secure verifiable guarantees that Iran’s nuclear program remains strictly civilian.
## Lakers to Sell for Record $10 Billion
A majority stake in the [Los Angeles Lakers is being sold to Mark Walter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O4yAUBeCnwR0WXMA_BcU2dNl2S-vavjhssImAxPLbjzLzCFN_0tE5599tumGI4dj-4k62-jQddJZItVKeIkZ8UC4lxTWnOdXyyhulAycQYLjouBynFUO8Jt2s1hMBqYas7I1Q0He9aO4WhUTqUMxmHrQZUHu_kDGzWgCU9kMT7CdNdHKUQvR6aAFX8sL0SspBLGZmWtAaasrt_xSOeicfr_Sm3C5pb6K91_osTP1h4Bi48zxbKs_jgwzcMSMDV2rKFwM3MXBhZeC0MWoclWTg5lcp3OMe4sVxy0SFF4qR_0znO-YHPzFWyrykV14-jleT7fo8Q4yhdD3TYtsxxO9C9Vcvvi18BQAA__8KZ4cC), who is the primary owner of the Los Angeles Dodgers, in a deal that values the historic NBA franchise at approximately $10 billion. The Buss family, which has owned the Lakers since 1979, is selling off control to the team in what would be the largest sale ever of a professional sports franchise. [Here's Forbes' 2024 valuation of most valuable sports teams](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO5CAQRL8GZ1hN24AdEFzibC690MJDM-YWmxEwY_nvV97VfsEm3VKp6qlU_27zzYYY9sdfu5GpPs07HSVSrZTnaKP9oFxKii6nJdXyyg9Ku50RUHJQXIyzsyGec98444mQuoaM0BI61EpDsxovpPIehJeLRgWOFuGUHLWwQzeMJJtgLhooMQoA3Q8tWkcepO6EGOAuF9YDuVBTbv-nsNeVfDzTm3J7T1sTzVrrs7DuD8OJ4XQcR_sqtiZnz8vAcCo15fP6z5RrYTghYM9wEvhzfMoLFX7pPIZSuQS-pVL528aXXSLx7yz32e73NRS6MFqNvR7kAKAZTk027nmEGENRmvXw2GyIXxXrr3Z9G_wMAAD__-KsiaU). Jeanie Buss will remain as the [franchise's governor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO3CAQhJ8Gd5wA2-C_oEhD96dNaS2wtsmtjQXcnfz2kZNHSLk7o08z8-t7_oZE6Vh_wo62LXk-8FMJW8MyExA8sdSaKZbsc6uvsmI-YFZCjVxoLr_mCImueeiiXRAV9h1aaUbRK6ON6DYbx96jDDH0WocAehrBQNBjCN7IXmOX7E0TWn5JIcwwPRREXMRoeiknEUbPBoExtVwev3M62oYLXfmN5RHy3pHdWjsr638w5Zhyx3Xm2m6JKXeDmXJCM-XkxJSrZy6tMuX8q1a-wJ7o4rAWxMpb5hWJ-L_O97lDefIPUMPC08F93n3dbosU3CeilA8eEYgp1xUbz8_9q9qwQaw7JPobsP3Xqm-r_gQAAP__3l-MkA) following the sale, maintaining continuity in the team's leadership structure. Walter, a businessman who has ownership interests in multiple sports franchises, is the CEO and chairman of diversified holding company TWG Global.
## Feds Charge 7 in Largest US Jewelry Heist
Federal prosecutors have charged seven suspects in a 2022 armored truck robbery near Los Angeles, where thieves made off with $100 million in diamonds, emeralds, gold, and luxury watches, [the largest jewelry heist in U.S. history](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAURp_GbEbXfxgGD13Y0iWqOiIHX4NTgyPbCeLtq_QVOn_Sp3PO92W62BDDvnzaDU31adrxKBFrxTxFG-0P5lJSdDndUi3PvGDa7cSBKwodZcPkbIjnJBtnPCJH0aBhWoHgutPQrGYG5ZllEgBk1wmr_KCksgMOohO-xyaY9xt0bGAAWvYttw49KC0Y62FWNyIBXagpt_cU9rqij2d6YW7ntDXRrLU-ChEfhI-Ej_Y2vw3aJb1nwsevK-HjETJea8on4aOm5VkeONdCg8O9Bh_QUQaw0TseGPNJVwyl0pgKtfuCEQtlnA-K91I02bjHEWIMpdNEwrLZEP9I6r_yvQz_DQAA___MnIOS). The gang allegedly followed the [truck for 300 miles from a jewelry show](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAQhZ8GM62mBdGAYBOyu-mGVqvNyF1GpoAZy7ffcl_hRif56vz9-Zq_KMRwPH7Tk231aT74LJFr5TxHivSXcykpbjktqZZ3fnA6aEZA3cLQymneKMRrVs1mPTNy37CVRkOPZjDQ7BZH6I1E9saj0poWgsHDuCg9ASpYm2BvNxjkJAGMGjukjT1o00s5wqoXoYC3UFPuvlM46s4-XunDuVvTs4l2r_VVRP9LoBPozvPs3oVq2ui6AYGu1JQvge5edgvVkA6B7o4V6GAQ6KQR6L755JivdudQaht54bVdKQaf8hFIoBsVaiknA3DjTbbb6wwxhjIYoeDxpBD_l6o_evJj8V8AAAD__x-6hI8) near San Francisco before striking at a freeway rest stop. Two suspects were arrested Monday, with one already jailed in Arizona on another charge. Four remain at large. The indictment outlines a string of similar robberies involving lookouts, forced truck entries, and threats against drivers. Some stolen goods have been recovered.

On this day in 1910, the was celebrated in Spokane, Washington. Sonora Smart Dodd created the holiday to honor her father, a Civil War veteran who raised her and her five brothers after their mother died during childbirth. Yesterday, we asked how you read The Flyover, and you delivered. Almost all readers responded that they read it from top to bottom, while a few confessed to skimming—we see you, headline hunters! We loved hearing from you and feel lucky to be part of your daily routine. Today's sponsor is , offering health and nutrition advice in today's edition. | Trump Reportedly OKs Iran War Plan plans against Iran but is delaying execution, The Wall Street Journal reported Wednesday. Following a Situation Room meeting Tuesday night, Trump said he would wait to see if Tehran backs down from its nuclear ambitions before issuing a final order. Tehran warned that such involvement could While Israel and Iran have already traded blows for six days, Iran’s most fortified nuclear sites—buried deep beneath mountains—remain untouched and are largely impervious to conventional weapons. Meanwhile, are set to meet Iran’s top diplomat Friday in Geneva, aiming to secure verifiable guarantees that Iran’s nuclear program remains strictly civilian. Lakers to Sell for Record $10 Billion A majority stake in the , who is the primary owner of the Los Angeles Dodgers, in a deal that values the historic NBA franchise at approximately $10 billion. The Buss family, which has owned the Lakers since 1979, is selling off control to the team in what would be the largest sale ever of a professional sports franchise. . Jeanie Buss will remain as the following the sale, maintaining continuity in the team's leadership structure. Walter, a businessman who has ownership interests in multiple sports franchises, is the CEO and chairman of diversified holding company TWG Global. Feds Charge 7 in Largest US Jewelry Heist Federal prosecutors have charged seven suspects in a 2022 armored truck robbery near Los Angeles, where thieves made off with $100 million in diamonds, emeralds, gold, and luxury watches, . The gang allegedly followed the near San Francisco before striking at a freeway rest stop. Two suspects were arrested Monday, with one already jailed in Arizona on another charge. Four remain at large. The indictment outlines a string of similar robberies involving lookouts, forced truck entries, and threats against drivers. Some stolen goods have been recovered. name: Kevin Roberts
subject: Do you know the truth?
body:
Americans should have a robust understanding of this document, and the principles found within.

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AUJFoFB8loJDe4gYq8n1uw~~/AARclBA~/285KSkrd6vH7bLSBcJQO-qGs_dB9R4n91MD1ItT2mxySjuy00FfRIq1QfLC229WcPQQKUO3KQT4sccFTpJt9s621sqpfG2wJvGlGnIg7XplrztD7eWy0Je7sa8aM-VhGVTtk0jc2KfTJOiTJcGPawv2m-6iLQSMuwf28Vya1Zy_kH_2_GRGFcFktbZlXl8iIKSLYf9KHpIKPglO8CwYJYomH5TzebSno_N7kDkSfMV3oMUDqGIynDdSY9I0uzYgRA5gEiZaqFA88-QwzlYbQFg~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

Do you know the truth about the Declaration of Independence?

This revolutionary document laid down the foundation of American political thought, far before our Founding Fathers won the Revolutionary War and wrote the Constitution.
---
|
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AUJFoFB8loJDe4gYq8n1uw~~/AARclBA~/285KSkrd6vH7bLSBcJQO-qGs_dB9R4n91MD1ItT2mxySjuy00FfRIq1QfLC229WcPQQKUO3KQT4sccFTpJt9s621sqpfG2wJvGlGnIg7XplrztD7eWy0Je7sa8aM-VhGVTtk0jc2KfTJOiTJcGPawv2m-6iLQSMuwf28Vya1Zy_kH_2_GRGFcFktbZlXl8iIKSLYf9KHpIKPglO8CwYJYomH5TzebSno_N7kDkSfMV3oMUDqGIynDdSY9I0uzYgRA5gEiZaqFA88-QwzlYbQFg~~)
---
| | In an era where the radical Left has attacked our individual liberty and America's founding ideals, all Americans should have a robust understanding of this document, and the principles found within.

**That 's why our policy experts at The Heritage Foundation created [_The Guide to the Declaration of Independence eBook_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AUJFoFB8loJDe4gYq8n1uw~~/AARclBA~/285KSkrd6vH7bLSBcJQO-qGs_dB9R4n91MD1ItT2mxySjuy00FfRIq1QfLC229WcPQQKUO3KQT4sccFTpJt9s621sqpfG2wJvGlGnIg7XplrztD7eWy0Je7sa8aM-VhGVTtk0jc2KfTJOiTJcGPawv2m-6iLQSMuwf28Vya1Zy_kH_2_GRGFcFktbZlXl8iIKSLYf9KHpIKPglO8CwYJYomH5TzebSno_N7kDkSfMV3oMUDqGIynDdSY9I0uzYgRA5gEiZaqFA88-QwzlYbQFg~~).**

This FREE eBook breaks down this important founding document's history, including:
* Why our Founders decided to declare independence.
* The writing process for the Declaration.
* The philosophical tradition that informed our Founding Fathers' thinking.
* How the Declaration affected American politics.
* And much more!

This eBook is an essential tool for all American patriots who want to learn more about our nation's founding principles.

**You can get your FREE digital copy using the secure link below.**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/guide-to-the-declaration-ebook/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AUJFoFB8loJDe4gYq8n1uw~~/AARclBA~/285KSkrd6vH7bLSBcJQO-qGs_dB9R4n91MD1ItT2mxySjuy00FfRIq1QfLC229WcPQQKUO3KQT4sccFTpJt9s621sqpfG2wJvGlGnIg7XplrztD7eWy0Je7sa8aM-VhGVTtk0jc2KfTJOiTJcGPawv2m-6iLQSMuwf28Vya1Zy_kH_2_GRGFcFktbZlXl8iIKSLYf9KHpIKPglO8CwYJYomH5TzebSno_N7kDkSfMV3oMUDqGIynDdSY9I0uzYgRA5gEiZaqFA88-QwzlYbQFg~~)**

I hope you find it both informative and edifying.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Learn about the history of our country 's founding document in The Heritage Foundation's _Guide to the Declaration of Independence_ eBook: [https://secured.heritage.org/guide-to-the-declaration-ebook/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AUJFoFB8loJDe4gYq8n1uw~~/AARclBA~/285KSkrd6vH7bLSBcJQO-qGs_dB9R4n91MD1ItT2mxySjuy00FfRIq1QfLC229WcPQQKUO3KQT4sccFTpJt9s621sqpfG2wJvGlGnIg7XplrztD7eWy0Je7sa8aM-VhGVTtk0jc2KfTJOiTJcGPawv2m-6iLQSMuwf28Vya1Zy_kH_2_GRGFcFktbZlXl8iIKSLYf9KHpIKPglO8CwYJYomH5TzebSno_N7kDkSfMV3oMUDqGIynDdSY9I0uzYgRA5gEiZaqFA88-QwzlYbQFg~~)**

## State Releases Grades 3-8 STAAR Test Results
The Texas Education Agency has [released the results](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUDuO5CAQPQ3OaBXY7U_gYBNns-mGVhkKgwZDC6qHmduvuqU9wcbv__587B8YYkjnb7xo5W-X90StRmKmspd8ZA7GExbmgqk-IiZuaHYN-i5hlGrZLYb4sw-dXQ-wi-poVdMd-h7mce78Cj1OI00TjOowzg2jdcPibK_MfLfGQRfWlxmMalEKFNxv87ygA6DDuOk4DhQDkA2cy409MX1jdfEnf1G5mXx1cfXMjyr6X0JvQm-ttZuJwXxqn5-Vc3qxhN5es4Te3nqht1em0BuMQm9q-gfIyk9Liau88JPkiSFVGZIshDakUx5PlpXL8zwjyRbYywvZy8qIRVaTC1VZfW5Cb11Z7aOFGEMdJzHAeWGI78b8fz9_rfpvAAAA__-Mo5TH) of this year’s STAAR test for reading and math in Grades 3-8, 5th and 8th grade science, and 8th grade social studies. ## Texas Instruments Spending $60B on New Plants
Dallas-based Texas Instruments announced Wednesday it plans to [invest $60 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ8Gd1iA_wuKNE6VbXc762COYyQMEZyE5O1Xzn2E2400o08z8_e23MB5F-5_4EBN7y0uAUv2SIRpSdFEcuuOkIgShPzwEKjAuiihOi56LqfFgvOfpa2sNsJOskIth040jRj7sdq1lI2FaRoag3ZQnYCxVbZpYLDY9huqyukTJno5SSmk6OpxnGATAs26DcYYYK1A6yimmnYkfEPe_Ce-MNVrPCqvd6JHZs2FqZmpuZRSHzmcHlMzBv7MTM1HDPhhao60Y2Jq_mK4C5nS88BAmVN8UubnwFNzF16YifeCG-e9i4G7wGnHHxwkfrnI679ruVZJ20c5M7kfWCvuBzj_bUa_-_Ol1f8AAAD__0dejHE) in building seven new semiconductor plants at two sites in Texas and one in Utah. Several of the facilities are already under construction. The chipmaker [touted the spending](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O3DAMBeDT2B0HkvxfqEgz3aZNaeiHGhOQJUOix7u3Dzw5QvqPxHvvz9f6ZShSev02O2r-DnlNeNWIzFjWkm1mchuawlxMqkc0iS_jViXUAGIEuazeUPxZ-9ZrK_wiW9RyGkTXiXmc200rFdBJtfSz8t72S5Chc_PSdUoM3RKwJX0_E6NcpBRSDI95XkwQAq0Lk7XWNL1AT5zLgzdk_DY1xJ_8xvJweW-j3piP2nS_GvVs1PO6rgelN1bOB3oyN2rU83MHlCqXc8fEFe4uFTjDPw1n9aOwQAnOCmYnDzc94DjrBiEX8HnHyuRgN-kMxvFZKL1AymmYBiXbov1xUYxUx6npxWs3FD8R-f-GfWv1NwAA__9fxpFI) as the “largest investment in foundational semiconductor manufacturing in U.S. history.” The new fabrication plants are expected to support more than 60,000 jobs. Texas Instruments is a leading manufacturer of analog chips, which are used to power sensors in smartphones, cars, and medical devices. The company was [awarded $1.61 billion last year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2uqzAQhuHVmA40NmCgcHEbutz2lMg_Q7Bk7MiehGT3R84WTv1I72i-n9t20z74eP-vT1T03tMW8SoBiTBvOZlE3h6oM1HWsTyCjnRpuwkQYwuy5cvmtA-fbWicMuAW3qDi0wh9D7Ocm0MNPXKjey4lmElOC0i5CDu6xVkxTmJuvKoxkHzhHDiM3TwvegdAY_fJGKPZAOg8pdzRgYRvXfbwSS_MnU1nE9RB9Cis_8fEysR6XVdno7EVmVhrm4kVJBMrn5lYv4HWx0L5eWKk0tanSiuhNT4En2L7rP7CQtW7g87QZOUeV-UiJzbA_dQ-fM_T30Z7KfEbAAD__0WzgR4) in funding from the 2022 CHIPS and Science Act. The company is [nearing completion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGOpDAQRL_GZI3ahoEhILiEbC-9ELVxs1gy9spuht2_P3mk-4LLWlXqKj3Vn4_1g3zw8fM3nTzL957WyHcJLMJ5zckm8dvBlEUyxfIVKMpN22rQPAAH0NPqyIeftW_cbNFNuuFZjw_sOnwOz-aYxx2N0-Noh67DySFPaJwlfvR67En3jZ9rGA560ho1Ptrnc6Idke22j9ZaUj2y85JyKwcLf1PZw096cW63dDZhPkS-iup-KbMos9z33YqvljIL2XQJiFdmqVg5vdV6QubAVLgos9R-ZZZ3NPhYJF8nRylQcQtIAh9fXATOlBnkoAgwIFgfgk-x-ifFa6dNrsz_5AJphz1d0ZH4FClA4dNvKbprk5RrEcjBcJX2kDM0eXZfd30tw6h6_DzJhzeg_N8sr9n8DQAA__8sFafA) of two fabrication plants in Lehi, Utah, and two in Sherman. Another two are planned for the Sherman site, and a new plant in Richardson is ramping up to full production.
## First Fully Robotic Heart Transplant in U.S.
Surgeons at Baylor St. Luke's Medical Center in Houston performed the [first-ever fully robotic heart transplant](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O5CAQBOCnwRmjhvEfAcElzvbSC60G2mMkDBb0rnfe_jSjk-4BNq2gVF_9-Vg_MKaYH7_xIMvfW1kzXS0RM9W1Flc4-p2wMlfM7UyY-UK_atCDhFEqswaM6bn2XbAOglEdWTUNcL_DPM7dbidA0GaYnXcqoCFnpkF7swGMYwDVd9G-ymBURilQMNzm2eAGQM5vk3MORQ8UIpd6452YvrFt6Vm-qN58Obpkd-azifsvoRehl4b5lQu9eC_0EornUps8qW6lHnKLtbH8B5NvmfxPkzHLzyavyHv5ZFlOyjE_JEq_U2Ohl67acF4xpdjGSfTwODCm9w7-2XtfVv8NAAD__xmuh10) in the United States earlier this year. Tony Rosales Ibarra, a 45-year-old Lufkin man with heart failure who had been hospitalized since November, received the transplant in March. Dr. Kenneth Liao performed the procedure by using a robot to make a [5-inch abdominal incision](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOszAQBeDTQGc0tgFD4eJv0uVvt0RjPARrDUT2bJzcfhW00h5g-5n39L2P63TFEMN--48bWX4ux7RTyZGYKU3pcAeHeSVMzAn3fI-4c8F5UqA6Ab2Q4-QxxNfU1t468KOsyUrTgdYw9EO9WumX1o-elCKteyd7A-A9gOnIaEdzHew7DHo5SgkSumYYRlwAyM2Lcc5h1QL5wEdqeCWmJ-Ylvo4HpWY-tjralfmeK_2vUpdKXUopzZtQiD7fB5W6nD9iw13ciLNYQsosvrL44YnTJ36BQsFglDZ1sv5eQowh96Zq4bZhiGcp_22qh1XfAQAA__9-Y4Ah), speeding up Ibarra’s recovery by avoiding a sternotomy, or cutting through the breastbone. Ibarra said he wasn’t aware he would be the first patient to receive the procedure, but [told his doctors](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OnDAUBeCnMd0d2ebPFC6mIdWmi1KiC1zWloyN7AvsvH00q0h5gNRHOufo-_0xfaAPPn7-xJ0sf21pinSXQMyUp5zmxH5xhJk5YyxHwMg3LpOWugXZgRqmFX14TU212lmug6rIqr6VdS1NZypnW9mY2cjW9HWDW7e2vUHUXa-HrjaDUpW37zLZqUEpqWT7MGbATUqal62f5xlFI2n1nPKDHTF9YdnCK12UH0vaq2Ad81FE_RR6FHq87_uxl_jOhB4pwlmEHh1hYCf0mNhRFnr0cGNk4ATBXwQunYVThAPZU2TItJC_qMDmc2HYzhBe8JcDvj3gHwj4CCe8ZzDD86l-_KqDqbJdj9uH4EvXi0Z-7ujD92P-P-fL6j8BAAD__9fflI0) to “do what you’ve got to do to save me.” He didn’t experience any complications, and he was discharged within a month. Since joining St. Luke's in 2019, Liao has performed more than 800 heart surgeries using robots in some capacity. Last year, [doctors in Saudi Arabia](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGuszAQBODTmA60tgmYwsXf0OVvX4nWZoktORjZm5Dc_im5wqtHmtE3P9flijHF_fYf72T5teVlp7MmYqaylOwyRx8IC3PBvR4Jdz7RLwrUpYWhldOyYkzvpW9W62CdZENWjhfQGsxgmmDl6IikGTY0q9ZTL7EHp0HROOleo2-i_ZTBICcpQcKlM2bCDYCc30bnHIoeaI2cS8eBmF5Yt_TOTyqdz_cm2cB8VKH_CTULNZ_n2flQ8v5JhZo_HKFmLBx9IqHmr6b90tr6KDcq7zbkR-W8twq0kUZN3RGOptj1OGNKsQ6j6OF2x5i-k_y3o55W_QYAAP__pgh-Lw) performed the world’s first fully robotic heart transplant on a 16-year-old patient.
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGO2yAQQL8G3xKBTWw4cKi0ym177RGNYYhHwtiCcbL5-8rbqj_Q67ynmdH79ek_gTKVx09Y0fFX2nzBV8vIjNXXbd6YwoJQmSuUtmco_ILge9nfLnK8KOsjUH573UU3y2hVh05NNzkM0oymW1yM0VhtAlqV-skoZbVKs7IJYNIBdEfuXCZHZZWSSt6uxlhIUuIc0jTPMwgtMRJv9coLMn5BS_m9PbFew7Z22S3MexPDD9HfRX-n8sTGVyqJCvE7HZhP74TD_eDVt-2oAcXwgStQFv14DleMdKxi-NiB4mWHygVrW2j_ywOsO9CjfBv_oDLyouXk_4QYtDJmMtpq3VUX9xflTG2chJaP89T3u_x_kZ-u_x0AAP__9TqSbA) **NASA and the Navy have an energy problem** Batteries weren’t built for the vacuum of space. Or the crushing depths of the ocean. Yet that’s exactly where today’s most critical national defense, deep-sea surveillance, and [space missions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGO2yAQQL8G3xKBTWw4cKi0ym177RGNYYhHwtiCcbL5-8rbqj_Q67ynmdH79ek_gTKVx09Y0fFX2nzBV8vIjNXXbd6YwoJQmSuUtmco_ILge9nfLnK8KOsjUH573UU3y2hVh05NNzkM0oymW1yM0VhtAlqV-skoZbVKs7IJYNIBdEfuXCZHZZWSSt6uxlhIUuIc0jTPMwgtMRJv9coLMn5BS_m9PbFew7Z22S3MexPDD9HfRX-n8sTGVyqJCvE7HZhP74TD_eDVt-2oAcXwgStQFv14DleMdKxi-NiB4mWHygVrW2j_ywOsO9CjfBv_oDLyouXk_4QYtDJmMtpq3VUX9xflTG2chJaP89T3u_x_kZ-u_x0AAP__9TqSbA) need to go—where failure isn’t an option. That’s why NASA and the U.S. Navy are turning to [Infinity Fuel’s hydrogen systems.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGO2yAQQL8G3xKBTWw4cKi0ym177RGNYYhHwtiCcbL5-8rbqj_Q67ynmdH79ek_gTKVx09Y0fFX2nzBV8vIjNXXbd6YwoJQmSuUtmco_ILge9nfLnK8KOsjUH573UU3y2hVh05NNzkM0oymW1yM0VhtAlqV-skoZbVKs7IJYNIBdEfuXCZHZZWSSt6uxlhIUuIc0jTPMwgtMRJv9coLMn5BS_m9PbFew7Z22S3MexPDD9HfRX-n8sTGVyqJCvE7HZhP74TD_eDVt-2oAcXwgStQFv14DleMdKxi-NiB4mWHygVrW2j_ywOsO9CjfBv_oDLyouXk_4QYtDJmMtpq3VUX9xflTG2chJaP89T3u_x_kZ-u_x0AAP__9TqSbA) Their systems are air-independent, silent, and capable of [supplying power in the harshest environments](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGO2yAQQL8G3xKBTWw4cKi0ym177RGNYYhHwtiCcbL5-8rbqj_Q67ynmdH79ek_gTKVx09Y0fFX2nzBV8vIjNXXbd6YwoJQmSuUtmco_ILge9nfLnK8KOsjUH573UU3y2hVh05NNzkM0oymW1yM0VhtAlqV-skoZbVKs7IJYNIBdEfuXCZHZZWSSt6uxlhIUuIc0jTPMwgtMRJv9coLMn5BS_m9PbFew7Z22S3MexPDD9HfRX-n8sTGVyqJCvE7HZhP74TD_eDVt-2oAcXwgStQFv14DleMdKxi-NiB4mWHygVrW2j_ywOsO9CjfBv_oDLyouXk_4QYtDJmMtpq3VUX9xflTG2chJaP89T3u_x_kZ-u_x0AAP__9TqSbA) where normal batteries can’t survive. Now, after laying a strong foundation in the hydrogen fuel cell space for decades, their momentum is accelerating rapidly:

On this day in 1948, actress was born in Houston. She is best known for her role as Clair Huxtable in the NBC sitcom The Cosby Show. Union General Gordon Granger read President Lincoln's 1863 Emancipation Proclamation in Galveston 160 years ago today, informing some 250,000 slaves in Texas that they had been freed. Former President Biden will near the site of Granger's announcement. We're sponsored today by , offering an investment opportunity in fuel systems that are making space travel possible. New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | State Releases Grades 3-8 STAAR Test Results The Texas Education Agency has of this year’s STAAR test for reading and math in Grades 3-8, 5th and 8th grade science, and 8th grade social studies. The percentage of students meeting grade level standards in reading ranged from 49% to 57%, representing from last year and surpassing pre-pandemic scores in every grade. Between 31% and 45% of students , and the year-over-year change ranged from -1% to 5%. In 2019, between 41% and 55% of students met grade-level standards. In science, 5th graders by 3% from last year, while 8th graders saw gains of 4%. Thirty percent of 8th graders met grade-level standards, a drop of 1% from last year. Texas Instruments Spending $60B on New Plants Dallas-based Texas Instruments announced Wednesday it plans to in building seven new semiconductor plants at two sites in Texas and one in Utah. Several of the facilities are already under construction. The chipmaker as the “largest investment in foundational semiconductor manufacturing in U.S. history.” The new fabrication plants are expected to support more than 60,000 jobs. Texas Instruments is a leading manufacturer of analog chips, which are used to power sensors in smartphones, cars, and medical devices. The company was in funding from the 2022 CHIPS and Science Act. The company is of two fabrication plants in Lehi, Utah, and two in Sherman. Another two are planned for the Sherman site, and a new plant in Richardson is ramping up to full production. First Fully Robotic Heart Transplant in U.S. Surgeons at Baylor St. Luke's Medical Center in Houston performed the in the United States earlier this year. Tony Rosales Ibarra, a 45-year-old Lufkin man with heart failure who had been hospitalized since November, received the transplant in March. Dr. Kenneth Liao performed the procedure by using a robot to make a , speeding up Ibarra’s recovery by avoiding a sternotomy, or cutting through the breastbone. Ibarra said he wasn’t aware he would be the first patient to receive the procedure, but to “do what you’ve got to do to save me.” He didn’t experience any complications, and he was discharged within a month. Since joining St. Luke's in 2019, Liao has performed more than 800 heart surgeries using robots in some capacity. Last year, performed the world’s first fully robotic heart transplant on a 16-year-old patient. | Flying together with our sponsor NASA and the Navy have an energy problem Batteries weren’t built for the vacuum of space. Or the crushing depths of the ocean. Yet that’s exactly where today’s most critical national defense, deep-sea surveillance, and need to go—where failure isn’t an option. That’s why NASA and the U.S. Navy are turning to Their systems are air-independent, silent, and capable of where normal batteries can’t survive. Now, after laying a strong foundation in the hydrogen fuel cell space for decades, their momentum is accelerating rapidly: with NASA, the U.S. Navy, and commercial space companies over the last 22 years Fuel cells that operated aboard two Blue Origin launches Follow-on contract with NASA to support 14+ day lunar missions Exclusive UUV partnership targeting the $11B global UUV market New partnership with Plug Power (NASDAQ: PLUG) to expand terrestrial hydrogen microgrid systems They’ve also reserved the Nasdaq ticker ‘IFCH’, but you don’t have to wait. Their current investment round closes June 26— | ➤ Anderson County: Lawyers for death row inmate Robert Roberson, whose scheduled execution last October was suspended, are requesting a new trial, insisting Roberson’s conviction was based on “junk science.” Attorney General Ken Paxton’s office has asked the county to schedule a new execution date. () ➤ The U.S. Supreme Court rejected a challenge to a proposed nuclear waste storage site in Andrews County on Wednesday. The 6-3 ruling determined that the state of Texas and local landowners were not entitled to judicial review. () ➤ Waco: The city council approved a request for Viridi Energy to build a facility to capture, refine, and sell methane gas produced by a local landfill. The city is projected to receive $887,000 from the deal during the plant’s first year of operation. () ➤ Cameron County: Commissioners rejected a proposal Tuesday to expand the South Padre Island Convention Center because it would destroy a site that has become a popular resting area for migratory birds. () ➤ Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth authorized the mobilization of up to 700 military personnel in Texas, Louisiana, and Florida to “conduct administrative and clerical functions associated with the processing of illegal aliens at ICE detention facilities.” () ➤ Smith County: Local officials are trying to limit the scope of an effort to build several wells in the Carrizo-Wilcox Aquifer, which supplies water to much of East Texas. Permit applications submitted by two developers propose extracting over 15 billion gallons a year. () ➤ Corpus Christi: The city is hosting the annual Texas Police Games this week. Nearly 1,200 officers are participating in the competition. # HELP SUSTAIN STRONG LEADERSHIP
Friends,

I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished together—but real change doesn’t happen overnight. It takes consistent, focused leadership and a community willing to show up again and again. **That’s why I’m asking you to become a monthly donor today.** Sustaining support helps us stay ready—whether it's fighting for fair housing, access to healthcare, or strong public schools. Our work is far from over. This is about building lasting impact, year after year. **Can I count on you to join as a monthly supporter?** A recurring contribution—even $10 or $15 a month—helps us plan ahead, organize smarter, and stay focused on what matters most: delivering results for our community. [BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=12d5ea358b&e=d9ebccf591) Thank you for believing in people-powered leadership.
Andrea

| Peter we are watching MAGA Republicans GUT programs that millions of Americans depend on with their budget bill. Medicaid and critical healthcare services are on the chopping block so their ultra-rich friends can get a tax break!! This is HORRIFIC for the elderly, disabled, and working class Americans who need these life-saving services. [That's why we're standing with the millions of Americans that depend on Medicaid and raising our voices to CONDEMN this tax cut for MAGA cronies' rich friends. But we need 10,000 signatures before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to fight back today. Sign on now >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td95df862-97cd-4adf-a184-7ba3d15bb440/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d97be5a-06dd-4834-bea9-d5ce57dbc4bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Look Peter – Strong Democrats like Cory Booker are saying enough is enough! [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ea41878-7042-420f-9adc-04d79490fc0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Since its inception, Medicaid has provided critical healthcare services to MILLIONS of Americans – including children, working families, veterans, and the elderly. But Trump and his MAGA maniacs will do anything to give their billionaire buddies a tax break even at the expense of our vulnerable communities. So we're fighting back against Trump, his MAGA allies, and ultra-rich buddies to defend Medicaid against their attacks. [ We need 10,000 signatures by 11:59 PM: Your voice along with others together is critical to ensuring that Medicaid's lifesaving benefits are here to stay! Please add your name today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02080659-7af7-4510-8c9b-5c2ebd842b50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb10f4948-0a08-4f90-9dba-4aa6e127e377/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your support,

Blue Amp Action

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ab60859-e4ac-4cd1-8f06-af6cbcc3a83d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 6/19/2025
body:
“Too many wolves”: Congress and DOI signal shift on gray wolf policy
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
**Reminder for Colorado changemakers!** This Sunday in Golden, our friends at the Road to Red Initiative are hosting a powerful grassroots leadership training from 8AM–2PM. If you’re looking to build a movement, lead in your community, or sharpen your organizing skills—this is for you. 🎟️ Just $49 (includes lunch) ⏳ A few tickets left—**[RSVP now!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
Now here's today's news... Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Denver leaders are scrambling to cut a [$6B wish list](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) down to an $800M bond proposal ahead of a November vote. The daughter of Rep. Naquetta Ricks faces [multiple felony charges](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in a stabbing case. And with wolf numbers surging, federal agencies may [roll back protections](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—welcome news for ranchers who say the program’s gone too far.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** New FBI files allege Chinese operatives [created fake IDs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to commit mail-in ballot fraud in 2020—and that the FBI ordered the [intel destroyed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, Purdue Pharma and the Sacklers finalized a [$7.4B opioid settlement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), but many say true justice remains out of reach.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Commissioner Sean Pond calls the GORP act a [federal land grab](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), C. J. Garbo urges action after election fraud [claims tied to China](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and Greg Walcher backs a Supreme Court ruling reining in [environmental overreach under NEPA](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, June 19, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[“Too many wolves”: Congress and DOI signal shift on gray wolf policy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
At a House Natural Resources Committee hearing last week, frustration among ranchers, landowners and state officials across the West boiled over. What followed wasn’t just venting—it was a coordinated push by lawmakers and the Interior Department to delist the gray wolf and rein in the Endangered Species Act’s long hold on predator policy.
“The ESA was never meant to be a Hotel California—where you can check in but never leave,” said Secretary of the Interior Doug Burgum, borrowing a now-familiar line from Committee Chairman Bruce Westerman to describe how species once listed rarely come off. “We’ve far exceeded the original goals... in some cases by more than twofold.”
Burgum’s comments came in response to multiple lawmakers from Colorado, California, Minnesota, Oregon and Arizona who shared examples of recovered wolf populations wreaking new havoc in rural areas—without any apparent legal path for delisting.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Montrose Commissioner Pond: GORP Is a Land Grab. Period.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Commissioner Sean Pond argues GORP is a deceptive federal land grab, limiting access for ranchers and locking up land, minerals, and water under the guise of conservation.
* He warns the bill jeopardizes water rights, fire mitigation, and rural economies, allowing the federal government to assert control through delayed legal mechanisms and wilderness designations.
* Pond says rural Coloradans were excluded from the process, calling GORP part of a broader playbook to push out working families and replace them with tourism-based economies and outside control.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Walcher: Supreme Court ruling is a first step in restoring balance to NEPA](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Supreme Court unanimously ruled that agencies are not required to analyze every hypothetical environmental impact, reining in the overuse of NEPA to stall infrastructure projects.
* The case involved Eagle County’s attempt to block Utah’s Uintah Basin Railway, with the Court signaling that distant or speculative impacts, like emissions from future oil refining, are outside the scope of NEPA.
* Walcher says the ruling marks a shift toward practical decision-making, potentially influencing broader environmental laws like the Endangered Species Act by limiting federal overreach and restoring procedural balance.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Garbo: If true, it’s the greatest violation of American sovereignty in modern history](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY C. J. GARBO****| COMMENTARY | JUNE 18** _According to new reports, the FBI has obtained intelligence confirming that China has produced and distributed fake U.S. driver’s licenses to facilitate fraudulent mail-in ballot voting. Let that sink in._
__
**[Knutzen: Northeastern Clay Busters rack up top medals in Skeet, Sporting Clays and Trap](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRUCE KNUTZEN | COMMENTARY | JUNE 17** _Over the weekend of June 6th, 7th, and 8th, members of the Northeastern Clay Busters SCTP team attended a three-day state tournament. The Scholastic Clay Target Program (SCTP) is open to youth from elementary grades through college to participate in the safe, educational, and enjoyable SCTP clay target sports of American Trap, American Skeet, and Sporting Clays._ __
**[Garbo: Immigration policy should serve America, not exploit it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | JUNE 17** _Let’s set the record straight. Immigration is not a right. Not under the U.S. Constitution. Not under international law. Not by any moral, legal, or civil standard. It is a privilege, and one granted by a sovereign nation to those who respect its laws, value its principles, and are willing to contribute to its future._
__
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🚊 DID YOU KNOW?** A ride on the Trans-Siberian Railway **crosses eight time zones**. Stretching 5,771 miles across Russia, the Trans-Siberian is the longest single rail line in the world. A one-way trip takes about seven days and spans eight time zones from Moscow to Vladivostok.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Our Constitution was made only for a moral and religious people. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other." – John Adams
|

name: Katie Britt
subject: The most important message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC

Now, he's on a mission to build another successful America-First dynasty to protect Alabama from turning into another failed Liberal Utopia like California.

Whether it's deporting violent illegal immigrants, putting more money back in your wallet, or supporting law and order, Coach is standing with President Trump and our MAGA Movement.

But the Left is pouring MILLIONS OF DOLLARS WORTH OF RESOURCES into Alabama as we speak. They do not want Coach to win this race - they know he'll completely dismantle their agenda and prevent them from getting a stranglehold on Alabamians.

It's up to us to join his team. I'm committing, will you?

[**Rush a donation of $5 or more before midnight to join Coach’s America-First Team.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=faca69f2df9f4c56822e8762ca007be0&_e=WvWYgXcxUj8FOYeZS3yGfCTRIgbyIaz407RVgzTzokzMfkExjcwcxZeEdxg_2AcyYHrPhpnDYkz_HBrt_AM0NnsCDdvZVpT-mFOSBiubXEr_4cCFbcAlHzN35EdF34r4rBmCoa7bAZ9HmidED1yYs0X2BAmAjncfD8pACPmhq7_4wppi9UbK2VnviQfZ1W7BW8IBRV87ogsHO2CnFlaSZW5vDpAymc0RAkocLoc--HKNqG1je7tJba9CpDxyDL6VmFPEoewnDvfiA1ERRRfn3nkIFbv-X61gvcuHkoOzKgX7y-588caZu9KIx6rBH6EHyK7SeIeovFvdXgutACv9Pu2veVGdMnVyD5PFeKmZMpchkLSIDgYOq-u9KckvwfPAx5rJ7511c854xiX2uBF8m9GS6F5X5N9TTB9bHi14vFUq2JCG8pFBt6aGjbGPvTT_E86x4hFQbv-sZe042QqiKdhDWlUCtOPhRUJDuB21pDMQmmiEEaRDm23HwcRZ3RebzOmhER3NM4PAcX7ZAwTzQLYfyUMuyTDCD421OLenfLfBRBilv9LzTf4BZzgJMogG)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

body:
I wanted you to hear this from me:

Hey - this is Monica De La Cruz.
I wanted you to hear this from me:
Bernie Sanders is flying all the way to my district in South Texas to rally socialists to defeat me! Bless his heart... [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt0unu4chj2ccf6dsktrl39jq98rhlipoo5hfg4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpim2oj2c5h2bs)The Democrats have been seething since I flipped a liberal district for the first time in 100 years. Now they're pulling out all the stops to claw it back - including sending in the socialists to destroy my campaign.
Make no mistake: This move changes everything.
Bernie's visit is a rallying cry for the far-left radicals who want to turn our state blue and change America as a whole. We can't let that happen.
I know personally what it takes to defeat the Democrats in South Texas. For the last five years, I've been on the front lines, fighting for our values and way of life in a purple district. And I can tell you that this is a battle we can't afford to lose.
[That's why I'm counting on you to stand with me BEFORE Bernie Sanders arrives in my district this Friday:](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4hchtpskuhdf6kfnu7fo6sg0240u4jc4kk70cjo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpim2oj2c5h2bs)[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb66m8mej3t2v1jitoldvihjg2krujtapshhctdg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cpim2oj2c5h2bs)I won't sit back and let the Democrats waltz into my backyard without a fight. But I need every single Patriot reading this email to help me mobilize our grassroots army, shut down their agenda before it takes root, and send a clear message that they're not welcome here.

There's still time to right the ship as long as we move right now.

Graham treats nuclear war like it's a JOKE. It's INFURIATING. It's DANGEROUS. It's DISGUSTING. And worst of all? He 's still sitting in the U.S. Senate. I'm Mark Lynch. I 'm running to END this madness and RETIRE Lindsey Graham once and for all. And I 'll be blunt:**the to UNSEAT this monster in 2026. But I can 't do it alone. The Swamp is ALREADY flooding the state with MILLIONS in Establishment dark money to keep this warmongering RINO disgrace in power. Grassroots patriots who are SICK of Lindsey Graham NEVER having the American interest at heart. Graham should be in PRISON for undermining the America First agenda and the President. The American people are BEGGING for change. I cannot, and I will not , let them down. But right now, I need every single America First patriot reading this to step in. 👉 to help me defeat Lindsey Graham and STOP this sick push for endless war: Let's take our country back. subject: Happy Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by One Pennsylvania
body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109872390/552526725/1507790650?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250619_fr_juneteenth_team_oc_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0MWUzNzhmLTE0NGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pN4llJX2FyTZd7jzirLLpKHIT00X3r9lyuvM9Kkwv8k=)
---
Happy Juneteenth, y’all. This day only recently became a federal holiday four years ago, recognizing the important date in 1865 when the last Black slaves in Galveston, Texas were told the news of their freedom — _**over two years**_ after the Emancipation Proclamation was signed. **We celebrate Juneteenth as a hard fought and won moment of liberation. It’s also an important reminder that we are not free until we are all free.** Things are tough right now. As the biggest economy in the world, it’s unconscionable that the smallest minority hoard the largest portion of wealth while the rest of us are crushed by rising costs: from buying groceries via payment plans to taking more out of stagnant paychecks to keep dilapidated roofs over our heads. Donald Trump ran on bringing costs down for Americans but since his inauguration he’s weaponized our federal government — rewarding his biggest supporters and instilling distrust, fear, and isolation to the rest of us. Trump is sending militarized guards into our streets to silence peaceful protests, after pardoning violent insurrectionists. Folks are getting arrested, kidnapped, detained, even deported without due process for voicing dissent in the face of injustice. Learning from history, we know our real power comes from bringing our people together in community and in action. The struggle for liberation is and has always been an arduous and long fight, made better and stronger in great company. It’s a fight that One PA and our members have committed to with resilience and joy. Join us this Juneteenth in celebration of the hard work that won the liberties we have today, that our ancestors could only imagine, while recommitting to the fight to protect and expand our freedoms until we are all free. _**[If you can, because every dollar truly makes all the difference, pitch in to One PA. Help build and sustain our movement for Black-led organizing with a contribution today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109872391/552526726/1507790650?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250619_fr_juneteenth_team_oc_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0MWUzNzhmLTE0NGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pN4llJX2FyTZd7jzirLLpKHIT00X3r9lyuvM9Kkwv8k=)**_ Thanks for being in this fight with us. In Solidarity and in action, Nydea Graves
One PA
---
| One PA is a grassroots movement for racial, economic, and social justice in Pennsylvania. We empower Black communities through voter education, endorse candidates who share our values, and prioritize leadership development. Our commitment is to challenge political disillusionment, protect and expand democracy, and unite everyday people to have a voice in our political system.

GOP Senator Eric Schmitt **[called out Democrats by playing a surprise video](https://substack.com/redirect/fc2ac6e6-ce31-48df-aede-ee1d7898df61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a hearing, exposing certain prominent lawmakers for lying to the American people about President Joe Biden's mental competence.
"Can we play the video!"
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fc2ac6e6-ce31-48df-aede-ee1d7898df61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fc2ac6e6-ce31-48df-aede-ee1d7898df61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"They chose to ignore President Biden's mental decline, but we do have a short video of some previous statements from Biden administration officials telling us not to believe our lying eyes. Can we play the video," Schmitt said.
The video rapidly spun through more than a dozen Democrats, including Nancy Pelosi, Alejandro Mayorkas, Merrick Garland, and Jamie Raskin repeatedly denying that there was any call for concern about Biden's mental fitness.
**["Who was running the country under Joe Biden?!"](https://substack.com/redirect/fc2ac6e6-ce31-48df-aede-ee1d7898df61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Schmitt demanded.
Watch the video:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fc2ac6e6-ce31-48df-aede-ee1d7898df61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---|---|---
No, it's not Nvidia... It's Mode Mobile, 2023's fastest-growing software company according to Deloitte.4
Just as Uber turned vehicles into income-generating assets, Mode is[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/7630b6c8-5524-446f-9aed-d052844cbace?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[turning smartphones into an easy passive income source](https://substack.com/redirect/7630b6c8-5524-446f-9aed-d052844cbace?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , already helping 45M+ users earn $325M+ through simple, everyday use.
They've just been granted their stock ticker by the Nasdaq, and you can still[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/7630b6c8-5524-446f-9aed-d052844cbace?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[invest in their pre-IPO 1 offering at just $0.30/share.](https://substack.com/redirect/7630b6c8-5524-446f-9aed-d052844cbace?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)5**

# Tucker and Cruz sparr hard in bareknuckle Iran debate
Former Fox News host Tucker Carlson and Republican Sen. Ted Cruz **[clashed Wednesday](https://substack.com/redirect/22f9b3ba-2332-49f4-9e67-1c65e2ed7423?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over President Donald Trump's Iran policy, with Carlson accusing Cruz of recklessly calling for regime change without understanding the consequences while Cruz defended Trump's demand for Iran's unconditional surrender.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/22f9b3ba-2332-49f4-9e67-1c65e2ed7423?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Carlson argued** it's "incumbent" on those calling for toppling governments to know about the country and think through ramifications, calling Cruz's position "reckless" regarding the most powerful country in the world.
* **Cruz defended Trump's Iran policy and accused Carlson of attacking the president in a newsletter** \- The Texas senator cited Carlson's Friday newsletter alleging Trump was "complicit" in Israel's attack on Iran and had abandoned "America First," reading a Trump statement that appeared to be directed at critics like Carlson.
* **Carlson denied attacking Trump while warning against foreign wars that don't benefit America** \- He insisted he campaigned for Trump, talked to him recently, and isn't against the president, but argued the U.S. should be "very careful about entering into more foreign wars that don't help us when our country is dying."
* **Cruz compared Carlson's foreign policy to Jimmy Carter and Barack Obama, calling it failed isolationism** \- The senator argued that stopping Iran from getting nuclear weapons that "could kill millions of Americans" clearly benefits the country, dismissing Carlson's "isolationist" approach as similar to failed Democratic foreign policies.

* * *
# Iran attacks Israeli hospital
Israel struck a key Iranian nuclear facility near Arak on Thursday as **[Iran retaliated with dozens of missiles that hit an Israeli hospital](https://substack.com/redirect/3a28da92-48dd-4da7-9c90-5263f829e931?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and injured at least 40 people, escalating the weeklong conflict over Iran's nuclear program as both sides vowed further attacks.
* **Netanyahu and Israeli defense officials vowed to intensify attacks on Iran following the hospital strike** \- The Prime Minister promised to "exact the full price from the tyrants in Tehran," while Defense Minister Israel Katz called the hospital attack "war crimes of the most serious kind" and announced plans to increase strikes against strategic targets in Iran and government facilities in Tehran.
* **The nuclear facility was evacuated before Israel's attack, with no radiation threats reported** \- The UN's nuclear watchdog confirmed the heavy water research reactor was hit but contained no radioactive material, while Iranian media reported two projectiles struck near the facility that had been fully evacuated following Israeli evacuation warnings.
* **Trump is considering deeper U.S. involvement as Israel requests bunker-busting bombs** \- The president said he has "ideas" but hasn't made final decisions about American participation in the conflict, noting that "things change with war," while Israel has specifically asked for U.S. bunker-busting bombs to target Iran's underground nuclear enrichment facility in Fordow.

* * *
# JD Vance immediately booted off of left-wing echo chamber platform
Vice President JD Vance **[joined the left-leaning social platform BlueSky](https://substack.com/redirect/e197ce31-9c98-47a3-91b9-d47a648f5334?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Wednesday to mock users about the Supreme Court's ruling upholding state bans on transgender surgeries for minors, prompting hostile responses from woke crybabies and a brief suspension of his account.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e197ce31-9c98-47a3-91b9-d47a648f5334?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Vance told users he wanted a "common sense political discussion"** before posting a screenshot of Justice Clarence Thomas' concurrence in _United States v. Skrmetti_ , which upheld Tennessee's ban on gender transition surgeries for minors.

* **Vance highlighted Thomas' criticism of the "expert class" and suggested Big Pharma influence** \- He shared Thomas' argument that so-called experts have used "bad arguments and substandard science to push experimental therapies on youth," adding his own claim that many scientists receive "substantial resources from big pharma to push these medicines on kids."
* **Progressive BlueSky users responded with hostility and calls to remove Vance from the platform** \- Gun control activist Fred Guttenberg called Vance an "anti-Democracy hack" whose "deranged thoughts" were "infesting" BlueSky, while another activist openly called for users to "cyber bully JD Vance off this app," leading to Vance being temporarily suspended before his account was reactivated.
