name: Representative Vikki Breese Iverson
subject: Oregon Farmer & Rancher Day Becomes Official
body:
| | | [](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fcontent.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FORLEG%2Fbulletins%2F3dafb61/1/010101978a2017b5-c1861494-09fc-4af6-b398-01c62459479f-000000/3CZ-JjGKlWYEjIO4I7N2jnXX9QhEIZKPHdMGmvWP7I0=410)
---|---
---
# Farmer & Rancher Day Ceremonial Signing
|
* * *
---
I am very excited and proud to announce House Bill 3141 designating the third Tuesday in March as Oregon Farmer & Rancher Day has been signed into law by the Governor!
This week we held a ceremonial bill signing the with the Governor and other special guests including Cattlemen's Association and Farm Bureau as well as several Oregon farmers and ranchers including Milnie Macy from HD 59. Thank you to the many Representatives and Senators who joined me in support of this legislation.
Farmers and ranchers are the backbone of our great state. They are the foundation of statehood, work to feed our local communities and show up when communities are in need.
HB 3141 is our opportunity to recognize the hard work, dedication, and invaluable contributions of our farmers and ranchers. I look forward to seeing our ag industries use this day to celebrate everything Oregon grows and remind Oregonians how large and diverse the Oregon Ag industry is.
# Proposed Pacific Power Powell Butte Transmission Line Project
I have heard from many of you about concerns with the proposed transmission line project through Powell Butte. I have met with Pacific Corp. They informed me that we are in the very early stages of the process and it is critical we weigh in through the official public comment process. I will send this information directly to anyone who has sent the public comments to my office.
[Please submit public comment here at this link.](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.pacificorp.com%2Ftransmission%2Ftransmission-projects%2Fblueprint-south.html/1/010101978a2017b5-c1861494-09fc-4af6-b398-01c62459479f-000000/zn8NrOe1aS_rZIbjxaXyqB9DFSmcwvlZbKR9qU2gKBE=410 "Public Comment")
I ask you to work along side me as we seek to guide where this transmission line gets routed.
[Fact Sheet](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fblueprintsouth.com%2Fmedia%2Fblueprint-south%2FBlueprint_Factsheet_V13.pdf/1/010101978a2017b5-c1861494-09fc-4af6-b398-01c62459479f-000000/OvnnOBdq4accEQn30wCc04u9M85-y_q2L0qJIBhs3p4=410 "Fact Sheet")
* * *
---
Unfortunately, Democrats appear to be playing dirty by holding [Senate Bill 83](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FSB83/1/010101978a2017b5-c1861494-09fc-4af6-b398-01c62459479f-000000/keY_4y4-cFzvVObUsMPLAxQpexNVCRVeUt2_S32DlJg=410) hostage to leverage stealing the kicker. I oppose taking the kicker, that money is yours and is protected by the constitution.
Daily, House Democrats decline to advance the bill to the House Floor, following a motion made by Republican Representatives. The motion to pull this bill to the floor continues to fail on party lines.
Senate Bill 83 represents a bipartisan and bicameral effort to lift costly and burdensome regulations imposed on rural Oregonians through the state’s flawed wildfire hazard map. Despite unanimous support on the Senate Floor, House Democrats continue to block the opportunity to deliver relief, clarity, and justice for rural homeowners.
Because of the bipartisan and bicameral support for the bill, it is obvious SB 83 is being held hostage for votes on wildfire funding or other non-related legislation. Either of these ideas falls short of what Oregonians expect from their legislators.
* * *
---
# Lawmakers Press BOLI on Prevailing Wages
On April 8th Senator Anderson and I sent the letter below to the Oregon Bureau of Labor & Industries:
Commissioner Christina Stephenson Oregon Bureau of Labor & Industries
Dear Commissioner Stephenson,
We are writing to express our concerns regarding the harmful application of prevailing wage laws to affordable housing projects in Oregon. Recent developments, such as the Bureau of Labor & Industries (BOLI) subjecting the Copeland Commons project in Astoria to prevailing wage requirements, have raised significant questions about the impact your current interpretation of residential construction has on the feasibility and cost of addressing Oregon’s ongoing housing crisis.
As highlighted recently in Willamette Week, the imposition of prevailing wage rates on affordable housing projects like Copeland Commons increases construction costs by 10% to 20%, potentially reducing the number of units built, delaying project timelines, or shutting down construction entirely. This outcome is counterproductive to our shared goal of increasing the availability of affordable housing for Oregonians.
At a time when Governor Kotek has declared a statewide housing emergency, policies driving up the cost of affordable housing construction risk exacerbating the emergency. Every dollar unnecessarily added to project costs means fewer homes built, fewer families housed, and more time before we can lift our communities out of crisis.
Oregon law provides certain exemptions from prevailing wage requirements for privately owned residential construction projects predominantly providing affordable housing. Specifically, ORS 279C.810(2)(d)(D) says “...the commissioner may consider different definitions of residential construction in determining whether a project is a residential construction project...”.
We are concerned your current interpretation may inadvertently hinder the development of affordable housing by imposing prevailing wage requirements on projects which should qualify for exemptions. We respectfully request, during this housing emergency, you use the power already provided to you by the legislature. You have the ability ensure more affordable housing projects meet the definition of residential construction. This helps them remain as affordable as possible. Aligning your policies with Governor Kotek’s housing emergency is critical to facilitating the development of additional affordable housing.
Thank you for your attention to this important matter. We appreciate you working to address the affordable housing needs of our constituents.
Read Full Willamette Week Article [Here](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.wweek.com%2Fnews%2F2025%2F04%2F16%2Flawmakers-press-boli-on-prevailing-wage-decisions%2F/1/010101978a2017b5-c1861494-09fc-4af6-b398-01c62459479f-000000/AH6EHTHRnQp4-u6BCw1PjJtp-Fq403XA1VqJpynd1AQ=410).
* * *
---
# Farm Bureau Visits the Capitol
| | I was so pleased to welcome Farm Bureau members from House District 59 to the Capitol. We had a great visit, and it is always a pleasure to have members from my district visit!
---|---|---
* * *
---
# Oregon March for Life
| | In March, I enjoyed supporting Oregon Right to Life as emcee of their March for Life. Together we marched to proclaim unborn Oregonians deserve protection from violence; and we will never stop working to protect their lives.
---|---|---
* * *
---
# Fire Service Appreciation Day at the Capitol
| | Chief Jeff Blake from Jefferson County Fire & EMS stopped by to see me while at the Capitol for the Fire Service Appreciation Day. It was great seeing him visit the capitol several times this session advocating for EMS funding in Jefferson County. Thank you to Chief Blake and all Fire service personnel across the state!
---|---|---
* * *
---
**Capitol Phone:** 503-986-1455
**Capitol Address:** 900 Court St NE, H-395, Salem, OR 97301
**Email:** [Rep.VikkiBreeseIverson@oregonlegislature.gov](mailto:Rep.VikkiBreeseIverson@oregonlegislature.gov "Representative Vikki Breese Iverson")
**Website:**[http://www.oregonlegislature.gov/breese-iverson](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/http:%2F%2Fwww.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fbreese-iverson/1/010101978a2017b5-c1861494-09fc-4af6-b398-01c62459479f-000000/gRMlT4Ghwj3-CFNMc7bI36ZBz879QI7zhsdP__ZlqCg=410)
* * *

**•** For questions about subscriber services, please email [Help](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsubscriberhelp.govdelivery.com%2F/1/010101978a2017b5-c1861494-09fc-4af6-b398-01c62459479f-000000/YpUJIFdBcivRxJPXRoMrFbYLi34CiXeWq3iVMfNYYqk=410) Information provided may not be final and is subject to change.

The world is on edge as the situation in Iran changes from minute to minute. President Trump has stated for years that Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon as he weighs the decision on whether U.S. forces will join Israel to attack Iran's remaining nuclear sites. Our panel weighs in on both sides of the argument, many want no U.S. involvement at all while others support U.S. intervention for a regime change in Iran. Tucker Carlson and Ted Cruz duked it out on Tucker's show and our panel has some thoughts of their own on this pivotal moment in history. Democrats were completely defenseless at the Senate Judiciary Hearing on Biden's physical and mental decline. It's a tough position to defend as the question still looms... who was running the country for those 4 years? We know the autopen was working overtime but were those orders actually authorized by President Biden? As Iran dominated the news this week, many stories fell by the wayside, but our panel has some interesting winners and losers for you this week.

body:
This is going to be one of the consequential elections of 2025 – one that could decide whether MAGA extremists take control, or whether state Democrats clinch a trifecta. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| **Something BIG is happening in Virginia.
**
Democrats launched campaigns in **_at least 90 out of 100 House districts_** – one of the most ambitious efforts this team has ever put together.

We’ve already invested over $350,000 into Virginia to strengthen candidate recruitment, voter outreach, and more. We have no intention of slowing down – we’re committed to investing seven-figures into Virginia’s legislative races this year.

---
This is going to be one of the consequential elections of 2025 – one that could decide whether MAGA extremists take control, or whether state Democrats clinch a trifecta and protect everything we’ve been working towards.

Our candidates are driven, they’re diverse, and they’re _already_ working hard to flip districts and win elections.
---
**And we’re only just getting started...**

[We want you to be a part of something historic. Will you chip in $7, or anything you can, to help elect state Democrats everywhere in 2025 and 2026? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDqV2bKIMRGsvIJOaErTgze0Eud2R4bgfFHggxEItkdZY_S_LSg-Hnc7EfHji4sGV8GvDR2NqLwJ7E2W1kvRxmdugcYKgq2MANtj-1uLOPnrrWCr7i-9gF_G53eTiR4F-GBR_dVA2Do7Vtnyae1rGiHKrSlqLViD9yzQV4h9Hq41jToyvbERfOwnEK_fl6aS7B0RE6TWMiz7uxKOe_hmmgSErvLHvoFzmFtSt5gZdmdwquPOZFXFHy7c_LXCUjObkqZxgSV6mTBXXpQm6gRBBQRbFnh2ngpXYFMerVAMBueBs5LT9PE4MiIJgUqCx9a3hfNzAHb6zAUSYbOTK8Nr-xGoSIdzysdcpUqH6vfwXglN3K--8r2KqQBN8PfbMPNPGg/4hh/Lm7Rq-XsS769eUnvHiJvjg/h0/h001.5r17jrKXKos6aNpshZC68PH6CV4x55ipDTw68IIHMIo)

It's clear that the Leftist plan to take over America was hatched in the dark corners of the judiciary. Now, it's all coming to light as they fight tooth and nail to stop the America-First agenda. There are hundreds of crooked leftist federal judges waiting in the wings for their turn to stop the will of the American people and destroy our constitutional republic. That's why it's CRUCIAL that you don't leave this message unanswered. My team and I are up against a BILLIONAIRE-BACKED LEFTIST HORDE , and our resources are being stretched to their breaking point. name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: A Pro-Trump news outlet tried to drag me and failed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
I know that hate will only win if people like me stand by and let it happen.

|
---
Friend — Look at that. The fringe right-wing media is already attacking me. Not for a scandal. Not for some gotcha moment. No — they called me “vulgar” and “unlikable” because I had the _audacity_ to speak out against hate. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109895861/552611702/-1576555546?refcode=250619_McMorrow_Newsmax&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjViNTg1Ny01ZTRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uOptMQHZ8knSzZGlUuVLNzJ22nzu4Hg3Vs4pXH2hGmA=)** The clip they played was from a speech I gave in 2022, after a sitting Michigan State Senator called me a “groomer” in a fundraising email. My response went viral because I said what needed to be said: **“I know that hate will only win if people like me stand by and let it happen.”** That speech—where I called out Republicans’ hollow, hateful culture wars—is now being used by Newsmax as “evidence” of my “lovely personality”. Then the host (Carl, bless his heart) said I’m known for advocating for reproductive rights, LGBTQ rights, renewable energy, and clean water. Hey thanks Carl! Here’s what we did: ✅ I helped overturn Michigan’s antiquated abortion ban and expand access to care.
✅ We passed common-sense gun safety laws that are saving lives.
✅ And a decade after the Flint crisis, we passed the strongest protections in the country to keep lead out of our kids’ water. These aren’t “culture war” talking points. These are real wins for real people like you. And now that I’m running for U.S. Senate, the attacks are only going to escalate. So here’s what I’m asking: [**Will you split a gift between my campaign and Ohio House Dems today? clean_body: I know that hate will only win if people like me stand by and let it happen. | Friend — Look at that. The fringe right-wing media is already attacking me. Not for a scandal. Not for some gotcha moment. No — they called me “vulgar” and “unlikable” because I had the audacity to speak out against hate. = The clip they played was from a speech I gave in 2022, after a sitting Michigan State Senator called me a “groomer” in a fundraising email. My response went viral because I said what needed to be said: “I know that hate will only win if people like me stand by and let it happen.” That speech—where I called out Republicans’ hollow, hateful culture wars—is now being used by Newsmax as “evidence” of my “lovely personality”. Then the host (Carl, bless his heart) said I’m known for advocating for reproductive rights, LGBTQ rights, renewable energy, and clean water. Hey thanks Carl! Here’s what we did: ✅ I helped overturn Michigan’s antiquated abortion ban and expand access to care. ✅ We passed common-sense gun safety laws that are saving lives. ✅ And a decade after the Flint crisis, we passed the strongest protections in the country to keep lead out of our kids’ water. These aren’t “culture war” talking points. These are real wins for real people like you. And now that I’m running for U.S. Senate, the attacks are only going to escalate. subject: Trump is ATTACKING ActBlue. Fight back now!!!!!
body:
Peter, what Trump just did should terrify every single person who believes in democracy.
He issued an Executive Order weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after ActBlue — the small-dollar fundraising platform that powers thousands of Democratic campaigns across the country.
Why? Because he’s terrified of us.
He knows grassroots Democrats are his biggest threat — and he’s trying to meddle with our ability to fight back before the election even begins.
This is how authoritarians seize power:
1️⃣ They discredit elections.
2️⃣ They silence the media.
3️⃣ And then — they come for the money.
Trump is officially coming for the money. This is an all hands on deck moment.
This is a targeted, strategic assault on the tools we use to organize, fundraise, and win. We MUST overwhelm him with IMMEDIATE resistance. Rush a donation right now to defend ActBlue, defend grassroots power, and defend our democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=052125_1]

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9d4b6f0ec55243d5a16af0720b16a59d&_e=1lh8LiIPIew1FMeRlYUa483_aS0L5DM6W6ZZx-2DqdrVVYgiHjSoi5z59pXi7ko7uy33p3O4RkFvz0KUifTIEagO7snPKkxGa7U_tISpPTRuTlbsiZrHEgJK3tpqdMfN1aRlcGLWA42jtoROkI9pyyoWw3YsAt5B9KEcusVxQiJ97mxVWhdmUQc7D-v4lYhQjyhiUKZXW8hUh6MNpbR3fisfPnDbaqINTSQWbCCQrldAyJKtNxLuR-zVAM-mJXhST0iyKH5o65ebSIsiNZ5pwhv1ag9JeieDL_LGI05HOTsGMnf2k2k8IqdqPLoGbRuk47qVtVm7OqnoKseog1WNUR992HR6tLZBs0VZKtqBEf_WKb0kHZIzaGRWQIQbs65yMBB4fJt4P3ApRPFwW2ftwGARXCc5UjX03D9xwF_1cuEJg-6yoi7zmjq8zmk3ZsVCB6TIzOWt-GyNK7hH4R3fx5xBFd7i8uxIcURDa4L7ZsBCuUsCfeo5dTIUjGkKwJjLVQgYyTlaehRryGAfHdBZYfuy0gVBWOYX6XAMkr17qgSp-gCZHoHBoishctP8ww4K)

* * *
This is huge, friend. A coalition of state Attorneys General is suing to block Donald Trump’s sweeping executive order on elections that would give the federal government unprecedented control over how elections are run across the country. The lawsuit argues what we already know: **this order is unconstitutional**. It’s a blatant attempt to strip states of their authority to run elections. This is power that the Constitution explicitly gives to the states and Congress, **not the President**. Let’s be clear about what’s happening here. **Trump is trying to rewrite election law by executive order.** He’s bypassing Congress, undermining state election officials, and creating a blueprint for rigging the rules in his favor. This lawsuit is a crucial first step in fighting back, but legal battles like this don’t come cheap. The stakes couldn’t be higher, and we don’t have time to wait and see what their next move will be. At DASS, we’re building the infrastructure to support the officials and legal teams who will be on the front lines of this fight. **Our Legal Fund is how we respond** — fast, forcefully, and with the resources it takes to win. Peter,
The race for Virginia governor is officially set: Democrat and decorated former intelligence officer Abigail Spanberger vs. Trump loyalist Winsome Earle-Sears.
At GOTV PAC, we're going all in for Spanberger by supporting 17 Democratic down-ballot races for the House of Delegates in key districts that are crucial for the top of the ticket. These races in Virginia this November won't just decide the future of Virginia; they could shape the entire Democratic strategy for the 2026 midterms and beyond.
But we need your help to ensure each of these candidates has what they need to turn out their districts and win. Can you chip in right now to fuel our efforts in Virginia and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06182025&amount=25]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109896637/552614470/-824697531?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_NF_VLBC2_250619_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGU3OGMxMS02NDRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xIRK3JIIh2SrxkNe3L3ZVduQL47F9nkPpJfbSUzikYc=) Happy Juneteenth, Derek!

I wanted to make sure you saw my important message below about my goal to raise $10,000 for the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus.

With a few hours to go, we are still short of our goal.

[_**Please, take a moment to read my message below and chip in to help us reach our $10,000 goal before midnight. 100% of your donation will go towards the VLBC.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109896638/552614471/-824697531?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_NF_VLBC2_250619_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGU3OGMxMS02NDRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xIRK3JIIh2SrxkNe3L3ZVduQL47F9nkPpJfbSUzikYc=)

Thank you. —------- Forwarded message ------— Derek,

Tomorrow is Juneteenth, a day for our country to celebrate the end of slavery and recommit to rooting out the vestiges of institutionalized racism and discrimination.

At a time when we need to be doing a lot _more_ to close the racial wealth gap and secure equal opportunity for all – the Trump administration is taking us in the complete opposite direction.

[_**But in Virginia this year, we have the chance to prove Trump’s chaotic, hateful agenda is wrong for our Commonwealth and wrong for our country – that starts with supporting and expanding the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus: will you pitch in $5, $10, or anything you can to help us raise $10,000 for the VLBC before midnight tomorrow?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109896639/552614472/-824697531?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_NF_VLBC2_250619_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGU3OGMxMS02NDRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xIRK3JIIh2SrxkNe3L3ZVduQL47F9nkPpJfbSUzikYc=)

Here’s why it’s so crucial we do:

Trump has spent the past 150 days attacking education, firing highly qualified public servants in departments across the federal government, and trying to strike down civil rights, all in the name of “dismantling Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion.”

**He’s using DEI as a smokescreen to advance his agenda, Derek.**

Just look at what he’s done: he signed an executive order to target funding for programs at the National Museum of African American History and Culture. He signed an order repealing provisions of the landmark 1964 Civil Rights Act, unraveling protections against discrimination. He even removed Jackie Robinson’s Army career from the Defense Department’s website.

I could go on and on. But the truth is, **Trump’s moves are just politically motivated purges of qualified federal workers and essential programs.**

**That’s why now more than ever, we need to make sure we’re supporting strong candidates in Virginia who are fighting with me to rein in Trump’s harmful agenda.**

[_**So please, Derek, if you can, will you join me in honoring Juneteenth with a donation to the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus and help us reach our $10,000 goal before midnight tomorrow? 100% of your donation will go towards the VLBC.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109896640/552614473/-824697531?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_NF_VLBC2_250619_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGU3OGMxMS02NDRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xIRK3JIIh2SrxkNe3L3ZVduQL47F9nkPpJfbSUzikYc=) With a few hours to go, we are still short of our goal. = Thank you. —------- Forwarded message ------— Derek, Tomorrow is Juneteenth, a day for our country to celebrate the end of slavery and recommit to rooting out the vestiges of institutionalized racism and discrimination. At a time when we need to be doing a lot more to close the racial wealth gap and secure equal opportunity for all – the Trump administration is taking us in the complete opposite direction. = Here’s why it’s so crucial we do: Trump has spent the past 150 days attacking education, firing highly qualified public servants in departments across the federal government, and trying to strike down civil rights, all in the name of “dismantling Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion.” He’s using DEI as a smokescreen to advance his agenda, Derek. Just look at what he’s done: he signed an executive order to target funding for programs at the National Museum of African American History and Culture. He signed an order repealing provisions of the landmark 1964 Civil Rights Act, unraveling protections against discrimination. He even removed Jackie Robinson’s Army career from the Defense Department’s website. I could go on and on. But the truth is, Trump’s moves are just politically motivated purges of qualified federal workers and essential programs. That’s why now more than ever, we need to make sure we’re supporting strong candidates in Virginia who are fighting with me to rein in Trump’s harmful agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The fight continues, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: STAND WITH NPR! (via VPP)
subject: NPR FIGHTS BACK against Trump >>

body:
this is HUGE
| | **FIRST:** Trump signed an executive order DEMANDING cuts to NPR!

**THEN:** NPR FOUGHT BACK! _They just SUED Trump over his unconstitutional executive order:_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250619_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=20270%2E878179%2EIeFnQ2) **NOW:** [**We need 25,000 Democrats to join NPR in this must-win fight for the freedom of the press. We can’t do this without a SURGE of public pressure: Add your name to STAND WITH NPR, before it’s too late »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250619_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20270%2E878179%2EIeFnQ2) | [25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH NPR »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250619_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20270%2E878179%2EIeFnQ2)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20270%2E878179%2EIeFnQ2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20270%2E878179%2EIeFnQ2).**
